[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z4guf54asfldqqlah5qis146tt0ae1v5rihk4io0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cjie0ob2c1h2bs) **These best-selling 4-Week Kits are in stock... and now they 're back BETTER than ever!** As part of this special "Inventory Celebration", they're going to load you up with [**FREE GIFTS**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z69g4ha5q6d91cju500ud81sjkd1mukmg1rc58go_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cjie0ob2c1h2bs) when you get yours today. Just look at all you get: **It starts with great savings on the 4-Week Kits** because standard retail pricing goes out the window. So you SAVE BIG and they're just getting warmed up because... [**Yes! You Get 2 of Their
Popular 72-Hour Survival
Food Kits... for FREE!**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zomhsml55ho0eevn2vo9lrtitpnbftig8250sdkg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cjie0ob2c1h2bs) **FREE Bonus #1 and #2:** because they are so popular and they are a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-hour Survival Food Kits for FREE when you get your 4-Week Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through any short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of their top-rated items on their website. So you'll get those 2 complimentary 72-hour Survival Food Kits AND... _(Hold on to your hat, folks)_ **FREE Bonus #3, 4, 5 and 6:** They're also going to give you their **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. The entire Digital Survival Library is yours free as a thank you for your purchase. But they're still not done because you also get... **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **$25 OFF Your Next Purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get their best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! Get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan. It's completely up to you. That's an incredible deal. But they want to sweeten the pot more. So when you order your 4-Week Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You get **FREE Shipping and Handling.** Last but not least, you'll get FREE shipping on your 4-Week Survival Food Kit and all of your bonus items today. It's not cheap to ship 196 servings of food (plus the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for being a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. **[Grab Your Kit And All Your Gifts Today Before They're All Gone](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z26043q1pe29d1denqmi08a7dlbdmtntvre44p0o_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cjie0ob2c1h2bs)** Isn't that great? The best part is... The peace of mind that comes from having a survival food stockpile shouldn't exclusively be for well-off Americans. [**So you 're getting huge savings today.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zrqdr8nmsabviioqc2al0cvmf1jsqgnl14c4hp8g_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cjie0ob2c1h2bs) **You 'll even get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan.** Just the best-tasting, made-in-America survival food protection without the sticker shock. **Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zfhbt223ihbeojctch0l33cl1ngf9a1e3q5o0nu0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cjie0ob2c1h2bs) First, you get their **no-questions-asked 365-Day Double Satisfaction Protection**. That way there's no risk for you, and you can even keep the complimentary gifts for giving your survival food a try. Second, if you open your 4Patriots meals anytime in the next 25 years and find your food has spoiled or gone bad, you can return it and they'll replace it with something of equal or greater value. That's only fair... and it proves how confident they are that this food will stay delicious and nutritious for the next 25 years. **[Grab Your Kit And All Your Gifts Today Before They're All Gone](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2ze373obrhubpuuc5vpio21md36q23731big2qn30_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cjie0ob2c1h2bs)** You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [take action](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z5589gtujms00db4rptg0ioq4cdb30vngbvdpgs8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cjie0ob2c1h2bs) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [imagine how much better you'll feel right away](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2znl2i2rvjk4rgtsl58ggi0trjdhtduvit80aqqc8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cjie0ob2c1h2bs). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. **As it stands today, it 's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. **[Grab Your Kit And All Your Gifts Today Before They're All Gone](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zb1nfdujqrte9uhs10lf3i2l96sc6g7o1diraoig_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cjie0ob2c1h2bs)** To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters | | **Rory H.** I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things.
---|---
| **Billy H.** Received my food kit in the mail and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmered. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup.
---|---
| **Kevin S.** The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start.
---|---
| **Carol B.** Hey Frank, I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight ..... IT WAS DELICIOUS... Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings.
---|---
| **Ken K.** I am not a full blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Sure, sometimes it is for a few days and I pray that it is not longer than that for you or me or anyone we know. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good although if it is that dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. Get some water, too, and something to heat it with. We made some of this product and had family and friends over for them to taste and they all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal.
---|---
| **Justin A.** My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This probably the cheapest survival food I have found and the company is great.
---|---
| **Gary M.** I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed.
---|---
| **John H.** We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our Food4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when."

clean_body: As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. Outrage Over Survival Food According to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like... Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired... Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick... Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means your family can become malnourished... Well, I decided not to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by most stores. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling . Currently 4Patriots survival food kits are flying off the shelves because: 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that protects you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high quality survival food without any fillers or poor-quality "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are made right in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are - just a fraction of what some other brands charge. There's no fancy packaging, it's military-grade sturdy stuff and can stand up to the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food has a shelf life of up to 25 years , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using the most compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too. You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve. I tried 'em and I think they taste as good or better than any other survival food I 've ever had. And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out. Their Best-Selling 4-Week Kits Sold Out Completely In Just 2 Days When First Launched... Today They Are In Stock! Use it to get their best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! Get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan. It's completely up to you. That's an incredible deal. But they want to sweeten the pot more. So when you order your 4-Week Survival Food Kit today, you also get... FREE Bonus #8: You get FREE Shipping and Handling. Last but not least, you'll get FREE shipping on your 4-Week Survival Food Kit and all of your bonus items today. It's not cheap to ship 196 servings of food (plus the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for being a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. Isn't that great? The best part is... Just the best-tasting, made-in-America survival food protection without the sticker shock. Look, this food tastes homemade. It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. First, you get their no-questions-asked 365-Day Double Satisfaction Protection. body:
---
| | | _Below is a longer, more personal message. _ [_**Before reading, I hope you consider making a donation to my campaign before our end-of-month deadline**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37840546/312859311/2014934148?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211023_FR_EOM1Bio_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDYxM2QyNC0wMTM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pLKEdogmzJf3W46-cXPilRySBLyHmt1e_LqFRL-jtzw=).
---
Peter,
Growing up, I was obsessed with Spider-Man and wanted to be the first woman to play quarterback in the NFL. At 46, I love watching my kids obsess about Spider-Man and my fantasy football team is middle of the pack after a rough start to the season. Who we are and what we learn as kids shapes a lot about our lives.
My mom, Martha, raised me as a single working parent. It wasn’t easy for her to juggle the responsibilities of working her job as a nurse and making sure I got to soccer practice and was taken care of, but she made it happen.
Sometimes we shared housing with other families to keep rent more affordable, and my mom taught me very early that people’s lives look different in many ways and there’s always a story about why. She also taught me a lot about love, hope, and empathy and when we went to church, I heard these same lessons. They stuck.
When I came out at 18, it marked a new chapter of my life -- parts of it were filled with joy, parts were tough. For years, I wrestled with questions about whether to pursue a call to ministry and whether I could create the life I dreamed of here in North Carolina. I heard a lot of messages that as a LGBTQ person, these things were impossible and I should therefore give up on these dreams.
That never felt right at a gut level. It was at odds with both the teachings of my faith and what I believe about our country: that all are welcome at the table, that the doors of a church should be open, and that our communities and country are at their strongest when everyone is included.
[**I'm running for Congress to lead and unite our community with love, hope, and empathy -- but I can't do it alone. Will you chip in $25 to help us win? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37840547/312859312/2014934148?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211023_FR_EOM1Bio_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDYxM2QyNC0wMTM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pLKEdogmzJf3W46-cXPilRySBLyHmt1e_LqFRL-jtzw=)
| | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37840548/312859313/2014934148?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211023_FR_EOM1Bio_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDYxM2QyNC0wMTM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pLKEdogmzJf3W46-cXPilRySBLyHmt1e_LqFRL-jtzw=)
---
Sometimes the biggest questions in life are answered when things get real. Meeting and falling in love with my wife Meghann brought so much into focus and, with her support, I got ordained and we launched the Campaign for Southern Equality to fight for marriage equality -- and full LGBTQ equality -- across the South.
Together, we barnstormed the South -- organizing in living rooms, church basements, and library meeting rooms. One conversation at a time, one town at a time, one action at a time. Our work was grounded in the values of love, hope, and empathy and trust me, there is no fuel more powerful than this.
It took a lot of grit and effort, but we helped win marriage equality across the South, and we continue to work every day to help create a South where LGBTQ people are equal in every part of life.
This is my story and it echoes the story of so many others in Western NC who have been told that they don’t belong, or they shouldn’t pursue their dreams because of who they are, or that there’s just not room at the table for their voice. This is the kind of brokenness we need to move beyond.
I’m running for Congress to help us build a WNC where every person has an equal shot to thrive. And I'm out here talking about love, hope, and empathy every day of the campaign. I’ve heard people say that that isn’t a winning message to defeat a radical Republican like Madison Cawthorn.
But I disagree. Living into these values is exactly how we’ll help our country heal from the pain and divisions of this time.
And it’s how we’ll win. Because organizing that is based on these values taps into not just the best in us as individuals, it binds us around our common purpose and the reality of our shared destiny. In contrast, organizing based on division and toxicity is corrosive not just to the spirit, but it actually splinters people, dissipates our strength, and leads to losing campaigns.
I’ve seen this up close over and over again, from our work for marriage equality to my two campaigns for County Commission. I've seen it in the fights for racial justice, voting rights, health care, and workers' rights. We are at our strongest when we organize from our values and our strength.
This is a big part of how we’ll beat Madison Cawthorn, and how we’ll move forward together across WNC. Another big part is running the strongest grassroots campaign ever in WNC and organizing everywhere.
[**That takes resources and it means hitting our goals each and every week. We have $17,456 left to raise in order to make our end-of-month goal. Will you chip in $25 or more today to support our campaign and represent WNC with love and compassion?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37840549/312859314/2014934148?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211023_FR_EOM1Bio_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDYxM2QyNC0wMTM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pLKEdogmzJf3W46-cXPilRySBLyHmt1e_LqFRL-jtzw=)

name: Chelsea Clark
subject: An essential election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chelsea Clark For Ohio 30 Garfield Place, Suite 900, Cincinnati, OH 45202
body:
The walls around the ballot box are coming down, and they'll be taken down by you and I, together.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37841623/312863846/649102781?refcode=EM_CT_2021welcome1_OB_CC_NN_4_NG_N
_Logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2FlNWI0Zi0wMjM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xUE40aAJjLDVnVS35VNWlBCMMBS59C9ttp9KY4yHy50=)
---
Friend,

My name is Chelsea Clark, and I'm a city councilwoman running to be the next Secretary of State for Ohio. Our democracy is in crisis and in need of fighters. No one knows how to fight for others like a single mother to two beautiful children.

A little bit about me: A background in STEM and a career in politics may seem like two very separate goals, but they unite around a single purpose: **the need to make change.** As a councilwoman, I have always believed that every person has the right to access the ballot box - not by chance, and not by struggle. And whether we’re talking about advancements in science or in democracy, we do not achieve change until every person can access it.

The stakes in this election are already high enough. We are not just voting for candidates. We are voting for our state to be a place with free and fair elections. Voting rights are the top priority issue in 2022, the way by which we are able to make all other changes. I was raised to know America as a place where we have a democracy that is real and strong, and now I am running to make sure that it is.

**As your next Secretary of State, I'll make Ohio a state with fair elections, where democracy is honored and where everyone can have their voice heard without jumping through hoops. I’m excited and grateful that you have decided to persevere on this path with me. The walls around the ballot box are coming down, and they'll be taken down by you and I, together.**

Let's make some change,

Chelsea | | | Democrat Chelsea Clark is a small business owner, a city councilwoman, a sixth-generation farmer, and a single mom. She's running to be Ohio's Secretary of State because the constitutional right to vote is under attack. Chelsea will fight to make sure that we all have access to vote, that all votes are counted, and that our elections are safe and secure.

clean_body: The walls around the ballot box are coming down, and they'll be taken down by you and I, together. | Logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2FlNWI0Zi0wMjM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xUE40aAJjLDVnVS35VNWlBCMMBS59C9ttp9KY4yHy50= Friend, My name is Chelsea Clark, and I'm a city councilwoman running to be the next Secretary of State for Ohio. Our democracy is in crisis and in need of fighters. No one knows how to fight for others like a single mother to two beautiful children. A little bit about me: A background in STEM and a career in politics may seem like two very separate goals, but they unite around a single purpose: the need to make change. As a councilwoman, I have always believed that every person has the right to access the ballot box - not by chance, and not by struggle. And whether we’re talking about advancements in science or in democracy, we do not achieve change until every person can access it. The stakes in this election are already high enough. We are not just voting for candidates. We are voting for our state to be a place with free and fair elections. Voting rights are the top priority issue in 2022, the way by which we are able to make all other changes. I was raised to know America as a place where we have a democracy that is real and strong, and now I am running to make sure that it is. As your next Secretary of State, I'll make Ohio a state with fair elections, where democracy is honored and where everyone can have their voice heard without jumping through hoops. I’m excited and grateful that you have decided to persevere on this path with me. The walls around the ballot box are coming down, and they'll be taken down by you and I, together. Let's make some change, Chelsea | | | Democrat Chelsea Clark is a small business owner, a city councilwoman, a sixth-generation farmer, and a single mom. She's running to be Ohio's Secretary of State because the constitutional right to vote is under attack. Chelsea will fight to make sure that we all have access to vote, that all votes are counted, and that our elections are safe and secure. biobox&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2FlNWI0Zi0wMjM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xUE40aAJjLDVnVS35VNWlBCMMBS59C9ttp9KY4yHy50= Paid for by Chelsea Clark For Ohio 30 Garfield Place, Suite 900, Cincinnati, OH 45202 www.chelseaforohio.com to receive fewer emails. name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: GOP hack offers $5mil for Sen. Mark Kelly’s seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, Ultra-rich Republicans are trying to buy Senate seats from Arizona to Pennsylvania and Ohio. In Arizona, loyal Trump donor and energy mogul Jim Lamon loaned his own campaign a whopping $5 million to cover up his miserable grassroots funding and project false strength ahead of his challenge to Democratic Senator Mark Kelly. The problem is, the Republicans' dirty tricks are already working. By dumping millions into their own campaigns, flaunting their flagrant disregard for their supposed constituents, and making a wholesale mockery of our democratic institutions, self-funding Republican candidates are proving they plan to simply try to buy elections. Mark Kelly is a NASA hero, a climate change champion, and one of our most important liberal voices on Capitol Hill. Kelly is the antithesis of the run-of-the-mill cynical greedy Republican businessman. That's why Democrats in Arizona and around the country rallied behind his historic 2020 campaign that delivered us our razor-thin 50/50 Senate Majority. But right now we're $858 short of where we absolutely must be by the end of next week, just as POLITICO reports that nearly every Senate primary has multi-millionaire self-funders “flexing their muscles.” When Democrats Turn Out is galvanizing our progressive grassroots army to do what we do best: fight back by whatever means necessary. We can't go it alone, Peter. Will you take a stand right now to protect Mark Kelly, Raphael Warnock, and all our vulnerable Senate Democrats from ultra-rich Republicans' dirty tricks? **[Stand with us, Peter: Take a moment right now to chip in and protect Mark Kelly, Raphael Warnock, and all our progressive Senators. Just $5, $10, or $25 could make a serious difference against multi-millionaire Republican self-funders. name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: WARNING: Peter, Without you, it’s impossible.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
---
| | | Peter, our End of Month deadline is approaching. I know I've reached out before and hate to bother you again... but we have too much on the line to fall short when we're so close to winning it all.

Nancy Pelosi's majority is hanging on by a _thread_. Taking back the House is inches away for Republicans - **[and with you on our team, it's within reach.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58595873:JQrDw72Nd:m:1:3253819041:D88DA9D349F42379A35152C08934E195:r "and with you on
our team, it’s within reach.")**

But we will not win if we fall short of our goal. Pelosi's got MILLIONS on hand to OBLITERATE conservatives across the nation and the cash divide is only growing deeper.

**So, I 'm respectfully asking: [can you chip whatever you can spare to take back the House for Republicans?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58595873:JQrDw72Nd:m:1:3253819041:D88DA9D349F42379A35152C08934E195:r "can you chip whatever you can spare to take back the House for Republicans?")**

We have to take back the House. We only need to flip five seats, and if we have enough grassroots support, it's possible.

**[Can we count on you? We wouldn't have reached out unless we thought we could do it... but without your support, it's impossible.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58595873:JQrDw72Nd:m:1:3253819041:D88DA9D349F42379A35152C08934E195:r "Can we count on you? We wouldn’t have reached out unless we thought we could do it... but without your support, it’s
impossible. ")**

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58595873:JQrDw72Nd:m:1:3253819041:D88DA9D349F42379A35152C08934E195:r "Countdown")
---

Thank you,

Dan Crenshaw

\--------------Forwarded Message--------------
Subject: Humble request for Peter
From: Dan Crenshaw

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58595873:JQrDw72Nd:m:1:3253819041:D88DA9D349F42379A35152C08934E195:r "Dan Crenshaw")
---

Peter, it's Congressman Dan Crenshaw.

I just had to reach out.

Nancy Pelosi's Majority is hanging on by a thread... and she's panicking. We're in a great position to take back the House, but you know as well as I do that everything can change in an instant.

The Radical Left is already attacking us - they're spending millions against top conservative patriots and investing millions more in their grassroots activist networks.

With every member of the Radical Left determined to see us fail, it's absolutely critical we hit EVERY last fundraising goal. **_Falling short even one time could mean the difference between winning and losing._**

**[That's why, today, I am coming to you with a humble request: Can I count on you to chip in $10, $25, or even just $1 to ensure we hit our critical End of Month deadline?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58595873:JQrDw72Nd:m:1:3253819041:D88DA9D349F42379A35152C08934E195:r "That’s
why, today, I am coming to you with a humble request: Can I count on you to chip in $10, $25, or even just $1 to ensure we hit our critical mid-month
deadline? ") **If every patriot who gets this email chips in, we'll crush our fundraising goal and leave the Radical Left in the dust.

---
| | | [CHIP IN $10](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58595873:JQrDw72Nd:m:1:3253819041:D88DA9D349F42379A35152C08934E195:r "10")
---
| | | [CHIP IN $25](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58595873:JQrDw72Nd:m:1:3253819041:D88DA9D349F42379A35152C08934E195:r "25")
---
| | | [CHIP IN $50](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58595873:JQrDw72Nd:m:1:3253819041:D88DA9D349F42379A35152C08934E195:r "50")
---
| | | [OTHER](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58595873:JQrDw72Nd:m:1:3253819041:D88DA9D349F42379A35152C08934E195:r "OTHER")
---

As it stands, we're desperately behind our goal. With everything stacked against us, we can't afford to fall short. We won't stand a chance against the Left's attacks.

Thank you,

Dan Crenshaw (R-TX)

---
|
---
| Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. [NRCC.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58595874:JQrDw72Nd:m:1:3253819041:D88DA9D349F42379A35152C08934E195:r)

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Breaking news on Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=QmFtTdBu%2FYEe6bYHpLt6W9vehY9e9qdH&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
**" Every day the Court fails to grant relief is devastating, both for individual women and for our constitutional system as a whole" - Supreme Court Justice Sonia Sotomayor **
Friend - there's been a major development from the Supreme Court on reproductive health: The court has expedited a hearing on Texas' dangerous abortion ban. But in the meantime, they have allowed the ban to stay in place, and as Justice Sotomayor rightly pointed out, the extremist, right-wing law continues to put women in harm's way.
**In a matter of days, the fate of the near half-century-old precedent of _Roe v. Wade_ - and the right of women to make their own personal, private healthcare decisions - will be decided by the Supreme Court. For the sake of reproductive justice for all, I must ask you to take action. **
**[Today, I'm urging you like never before to speak out: Click here to add your name to my time-sensitive petition demanding the Supreme Court protect abortion rights. This is my biggest petition yet, which is why I still need at least 25,000 more signatures, including yours, before 11:59 p.m.](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-WHPA-SCOTUS?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1091-su-nd)**
This isn't just a case of judicial precedent, Friend. It's about fundamental human rights - and whether or not our democratic institutions will take the right steps to protect them. If they don't, and if Texas' anti-women law stands, we could see a return to the dark days of our country when every single woman's personal decision about when to have a child was controlled by the government: a return to when abortion care was driven underground, where women were harmed and even died.
That is the antithesis of everything America stands for - and right now, the world is watching, and our friends, family, and neighbors are hoping and praying that the Supreme Court of the United States of America makes the right decision. **It 's up to grassroots activists like you and this entire team to compel the Court to protect reproductive freedom. So please, before my 11:59 p.m. deadline, can I count on you to sign my petition?**
**[Add your name now to urge the Supreme Court to protect abortion rights.](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-WHPA-SCOTUS?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1091-su-nd)**
Thank you for taking action at such an urgent moment for our country.
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=irJnra2hh5pA4JLM2zaDrPIjmKxt%2BjvP&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

subject: The Build Back Better Act should benefit every American
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

Hi friend,
Families in Westchester and Rockland Counties shouldn’t struggle to afford child care.
Seniors shouldn’t have to work past the age of retirement to pay for their prescription drugs.
Students shouldn’t have to choose between higher education and financial stability.
But millions of Americans struggle with these issues every day.
President Biden’s _Build Back Better Ac_ t is an opportunity for our government to finally deliver for working families by establishing universal social programs to improve their lives.
But right now, a handful of renegade Democratic lawmakers want to weaken the bill by means testing it — or limiting who has access to benefits based on arbitrary income thresholds.
Mondaire is leading the charge to ensure these programs are universal. He recently wrote an [op-ed with Katie Porter in The Washington Post](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37847950/312891202/-1705495385?refcode=AU_MLJ_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211023_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDA2N2JiNy0wZDM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qL0Tq0o0OQAdZzu0CeaueeEazoFrizrE0Nb3Iuym-Ms=&emci=eb4a7bc2-4933-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=bd067bb7-0d34-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=24719896) on why we shouldn’t limit our social programs.
Not only does means testing have a history of being ineffective and unnecessary, but it also creates barriers for the most vulnerable Americans to receive the much-needed benefits intended.
The programs included in the _Build Back Better Act_ are popular with the American people. But if we means test them and deprive millions of Americans of needed relief, they won’t be.

name: Ras Smith
subject: What we've been up to in October. [PHOTOS]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor
body:
Meeting with Iowans across the state gives me energy, which is why I want to share some photos. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37848470/312893098/692104027?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OThiMGEyNC0xMDM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2JT7tJ3RsHoNGj3izUEO7vYecFIeb9QvsGzJijCQNdU=)
It's been an energizing month on the campaign trail, friend.

I've been out on the picket line regularly with the striking John Deere workers doing supply drops and standing in solidarity. Meanwhile, our team has made sure to visit local Democratic parties and community groups across the state.

Campaigning as a dad is challenging at times. I took breaks to spend time with my wife and kids when possible, and they've been the best field team when helping out on the road.

That said, meeting with Iowans across the state gives me energy, which is why I want to share some photos below. You may even see some folks you recognize.

Please take a moment to read, then consider spreading the word about our campaign by forwarding this note to friends and family.

More soon,

Ras Smith
Democrat for Governor

| **[Contribute »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37848471/312893099/-73891749?refcode=em-102221-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OThiMGEyNC0xMDM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2JT7tJ3RsHoNGj3izUEO7vYecFIeb9QvsGzJijCQNdU=)**

**Caught up with Ty from the _Iowa Starting Line._ We got breakfast at Johnnie Mars. The hashbrowns are delicious!**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37848473/312893101/-73891749?refcode=em-102221-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OThiMGEyNC0xMDM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2JT7tJ3RsHoNGj3izUEO7vYecFIeb9QvsGzJijCQNdU=)
**Hall Harvester is one of my favorite events. I had a blast supporting my good friend Rep. Chris Hall and saying "hi" to local leaders like Penny.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37848474/312893102/-73891749?refcode=em-102221-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OThiMGEyNC0xMDM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2JT7tJ3RsHoNGj3izUEO7vYecFIeb9QvsGzJijCQNdU=)
**I spent time with my wife and kids in Iowa City celebrating Hispanic Heritage Month. The music was great, and the time with family on the campaign trail is precious.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37848475/312893103/-73891749?refcode=em-102221-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OThiMGEyNC0xMDM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2JT7tJ3RsHoNGj3izUEO7vYecFIeb9QvsGzJijCQNdU=)
**We visited the Warren County Dems. This picture just about sums up a week of meeting Democrats across the state.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37848476/312893104/-73891749?refcode=em-102221-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OThiMGEyNC0xMDM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2JT7tJ3RsHoNGj3izUEO7vYecFIeb9QvsGzJijCQNdU=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37848477/312893105/-73891749?refcode=em-102221-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OThiMGEyNC0xMDM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2JT7tJ3RsHoNGj3izUEO7vYecFIeb9QvsGzJijCQNdU=)
**After a great event at the home of Prakash, I was honored to accept a gift that includes a piece of Iowa history from the home of Norman Borlaug.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37848478/312893106/-73891749?refcode=em-102221-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OThiMGEyNC0xMDM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2JT7tJ3RsHoNGj3izUEO7vYecFIeb9QvsGzJijCQNdU=)
**And since we're making a point to enjoy all Iowa has to offer -- we met with supporters at an awesome barn party in Urbandale. I only took home a few slices of pie... well maybe more than a few (for the kids, right?) 🥧**

* * *
Unite the Country was formed in 2019 to support Joe Biden’s candidacy for President. After a resounding victory in 2020, our goal now is to communicate to the American electorate how President Biden’s agenda will both advance broad and desperately needed policy changes and help to heal our fractured political environment.

Unite the Country is proud to continue to support President Biden’s bold agenda and vision for America, and we will support candidates for public office who have similar foresight and courage. name: GOP Presidential
subject: Help us fight socialism
body:
Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that sup
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from GOP Presidential is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zf4jj0rvplt9spnifq8ceq9ve7ic2v74d6q46u50_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c1g68oj3cdh2bs)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans—views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9rqsqmnlbl5k977iubhqcuke4mj0anvkktqodj8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c1g68oj3cdh2bs)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive—and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvsgvk6rfs2roorsk2j7oft5jk6a80pdpv9nib4g_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c1g68oj3cdh2bs)
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37849670/312900180/-846547794?refcode=em_pet_2021.10.23_b1_thmq_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGIzOWU3YS0xMzM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bRtsJVHZBSpYor_Fe9719BzL8CfBn-CHJVHBqWJxN8Q=) Peter,

After losing the House, the Senate, and the White House in 2020, Republicans are taking aim at voting rights in order to undercut the voices of those who elected Democrats to Washington.

When the Senate had an opportunity to outlaw voter suppression and stop partisan gerrymandering this summer by passing H.R. 1 — _The For the People Act_ — every single Republican voted NO.

**But the fight for voting rights is far from finished:** Last month, the House passed the _John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act_ , which would restore the full protections of the _1965 Voting Rights Act_ and outlaw racially discriminatory voting practices. Once again, our opponent voted against what is best for Iowans and voted NO.

**Are you with us in the fight to defend our democracy?[Sign our petition now to demand that the Senate PASS the John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act and put an end to voter suppression!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37849671/312900181/-186896203?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGIzOWU3YS0xMzM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bRtsJVHZBSpYor_Fe9719BzL8CfBn-CHJVHBqWJxN8Q=&emci=fe82312d-4733-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=e8b39e7a-1334-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=6566505)**

Inspired by false voter fraud conspiracies, more than 400 bills aimed at restricting voting access have been introduced in GOP-led legislatures in 2021. Here in Iowa, Gov. We need to take action now to ensure that every single American can make their voices heard in the midterm elections. **The future of our democracy is at stake:[Sign on now to demand that the Senate PASS the _John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act_ and put an end to voter suppression!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37849673/312900183/-186896203?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGIzOWU3YS0xMzM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bRtsJVHZBSpYor_Fe9719BzL8CfBn-CHJVHBqWJxN8Q=&emci=fe82312d-4733-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=e8b39e7a-1334-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=6566505)** Thank you,

name: ICYMI News
subject: Don’t miss this
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9temvgu98c4vjm6n40e0gu04veab8ej7pdm2ib0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c1g68oj1c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ziq0sfk91usfq9ok1bmpicg3kfgvo9s6qsqdsjc8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c1g68oj1c1h2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z44677adt9fusdrfedulk3krat02m6sdv9aci76o_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c1g68oj1c1h2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844
---
Hillsdale College 33 East College Street Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

clean_body: Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course | Sponsored message | ---|---|--- | | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844 Hillsdale College 33 East College Street Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Right now, Donald Trump’s hand-picked candidate for Governor of Virginia, Glenn Youngkin, is **_LEADING_** in some polls. Not only that, but national Republicans are pouring money into Virginia to **_out-organize_** Democrats, and **_Republican enthusiasm is at an all time HIGH._**

name: John Cranley
subject: We brought a comeback to Cincinnati. We have to do the same for Ohio.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John Cranley Committee
body:
– | **_[Friend, this is a longer email about how we’re going to write Ohio’s comeback story together. I hope you’ll read to the end, but if you’re already with me in this fight, chip in $5, $10, whatever you can afford to help flip this state blue>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37850267/312903394/-1406512299?amount=5&refcode=ea.d5e70d19-1634-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ms=ea.d5e70d19-1634-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWU3MGQxOS0xNjM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6nXXLuPuvoc6zd-yWXxHikGpplCD1q5XpFHdGFsjMvs=)_** It’s no secret that Ohio isn’t working for working folks anymore. A tax system that props up massive corporations and the super-rich at the expense of the middle class. A government that is more concerned with clutching onto power than delivering for our communities. And everywhere, too few jobs, too little opportunity. _But that doesn’t have to be Ohio’s story._ **We wrote the playbook for success in Cincinnati.** As mayor, I partnered with labor unions to make sure that workers were getting their fair share. During my time in office, Cincinnati led the way to become the first city in Ohio to pass a local prevailing wage law. We created _thousands_ of good-paying jobs — our median income level is still rising and poverty is still on the decline. **That’s how you build a comeback, friend. You invest in workers. You invest in their families. And you build an economy from the ground up.** It’s what we did here in Cincinnati — and it’s what we can do for Ohio, too. I’m proud to have the endorsement of local labor unions — IBEW Local 212, Plumbers and Pipefitters Local 392, and Firefighters Union Local 48 — who know that our campaign is going to put the economy, jobs, and delivering for working folks front and center. **We’re building a campaign focused on Ohio’s working families, and I hope you’ll join our movement today.** **_[Will you pitch in today to help grow our campaign for the coming weeks and months? clean_body: – | = It’s no secret that Ohio isn’t working for working folks anymore. A tax system that props up massive corporations and the super-rich at the expense of the middle class. A government that is more concerned with clutching onto power than delivering for our communities. And everywhere, too few jobs, too little opportunity. But that doesn’t have to be Ohio’s story. We wrote the playbook for success in Cincinnati. As mayor, I partnered with labor unions to make sure that workers were getting their fair share. During my time in office, Cincinnati led the way to become the first city in Ohio to pass a local prevailing wage law. We created thousands of good-paying jobs — our median income level is still rising and poverty is still on the decline. That’s how you build a comeback, friend. You invest in workers. name: Ryan Girdusky
subject: Sacrificing Your Kids for Their Agenda
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
Peter, The left will sacrifice your children for their agenda. You want to know how I'm so sure of this? I'm sure because I'm watching what's happening in Loudoun County, Virginia right now. **We have PROOF** that the Loudoun School Board covered up the sexual assault of a freshman girl, by a crossdressing boy in the girl's bathroom. Conveniently- the school board was in the process of drafting and proposing radical transgender policies. They knew that if this horrific incident were to become public, parents and students alike would REVOLT. And I am emailing you today to ensure that the ENTIRE Loudoun County school board knows that they won't be allowed to get away with this. [**Will you rush in $25 to help us pressure the Loudoun County school board resign today, and help us replace them with Conservative patriots?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58596045:6kZhh72NR:m:1:3253819041:A44CEF3AD5831FE96C6B6959422C0D8B:r) These school board members care more about left-wing activism than your children's safety. Mind you, these are the same types of people who fought to destroy Justice Kavanaugh's career over a false allegation of assault and launched the Me Too movement. But now that one of their precious transgenders violated a CHILD, they're not just silent - they're lying to protect a criminal - and more importantly, their agenda. And if we don't stand up now and demand justice, then nothing is stopping it from happening again. You might not be able to point to Loudoun County, Virginia on a map, but it's a county probably a lot like yours. Loudoun County is normal...or at least it used to be. Up until recently, local government offices were occupied largely by conservatives. But in 2018, the leftists took over... In such a short time, leftists so extreme they were willing to cover-up a rape took over. If it can happen in Loudoun County- it can happen in your backyard. Even if you live in a conservative county or state- a leftist school board could still be put in charge of a child you care about. But let me take a moment to introduce myself. My name is Ryan Girdusky, and I founded the 1776 Project PAC to take back our local school boards and ensure that our children are taught to love and respect America. I have a simple, but powerful plan of attack to transform the landscape of our local public school system, nationwide. **This is my 3 R 's battleplan:**
1. **__****_Resign:_** we'll turn up the public pressure with TV, Radio, and Print media campaigns demanding far left school board members quit.
2. **__****_Recall:_** we'll help collect petitions signatures and aid local parents, grandparents, and concerned taxpayers in efforts to recall radical school board members who must be removed from office
3. **__****_Replace:_** We'll support the campaigns of pro-America conservatives who run for local school board against liberal pro-CRT school board members.

And friend, today I need your help with that 1st R. [**There 's never been a better time to turn up the pressure on these sick, twisted radicals. But we cannot do this without your help. Will you contribute $25 to our fund to kick the disgusting enablers of rape out of office?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58596045:6kZhh72NR:m:1:3253819041:A44CEF3AD5831FE96C6B6959422C0D8B:r) When I first heard this story, I didn't want to believe it. I knew that school officials had gone off the deep end, but I didn't want to believe they'd go so far as to cover up the rape of a child to further their agenda. They've made their priorities clear - and it's time to make mine clear. I care about America's children, and I'm going to school district to school district, office to office, and taking back our schools. But I don't stand a chance without you. Sincerely, Ryan Girdusky, President 1776 Project PAC [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58596045:6kZhh72NR:m:1:3253819041:A44CEF3AD5831FE96C6B6959422C0D8B:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58596045:6kZhh72NR:m:1:3253819041:A44CEF3AD5831FE96C6B6959422C0D8B:r) **[Please consider making a critical donation to the 1776 Project PAC today](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58596045:6kZhh72NR:m:1:3253819041:A44CEF3AD5831FE96C6B6959422C0D8B:r)** Paid for by 1776 Project PAC

I'm sure because I'm watching what's happening in Loudoun County, Virginia right now. We have PROOF that the Loudoun School Board covered up the sexual assault of a freshman girl, by a crossdressing boy in the girl's bathroom. Conveniently- the school board was in the process of drafting and proposing radical transgender policies. They knew that if this horrific incident were to become public, parents and students alike would REVOLT. And I am emailing you today to ensure that the ENTIRE Loudoun County school board knows that they won't be allowed to get away with this. These school board members care more about left-wing activism than your children's safety. Mind you, these are the same types of people who fought to destroy Justice Kavanaugh's career over a false allegation of assault and launched the Me Too movement. But now that one of their precious transgenders violated a CHILD, they're not just silent - they're lying to protect a criminal - and more importantly, their agenda. And if we don't stand up now and demand justice, then nothing is stopping it from happening again. You might not be able to point to Loudoun County, Virginia on a map, but it's a county probably a lot like yours. Loudoun County is normal...or at least it used to be. Up until recently, local government offices were occupied largely by conservatives. But in 2018, the leftists took over... In such a short time, leftists so extreme they were willing to cover-up a rape took over. If it can happen in Loudoun County- it can happen in your backyard. Even if you live in a conservative county or state- a leftist school board could still be put in charge of a child you care about. But let me take a moment to introduce myself. My name is Ryan Girdusky, and I founded the 1776 Project PAC to take back our local school boards and ensure that our children are taught to love and respect America. I have a simple, but powerful plan of attack to transform the landscape of our local public school system, nationwide. This is my 3 R 's battleplan: 1. _Resign: we'll turn up the public pressure with TV, Radio, and Print media campaigns demanding far left school board members quit. 2. _Recall: we'll help collect petitions signatures and aid local parents, grandparents, and concerned taxpayers in efforts to recall radical school board members who must be removed from office 3. _Replace: We'll support the campaigns of pro-America conservatives who run for local school board against liberal pro-CRT school board members. And friend, today I need your help with that 1st R. When I first heard this story, I didn't want to believe it. I knew that school officials had gone off the deep end, but I didn't want to believe they'd go so far as to cover up the rape of a child to further their agenda. They've made their priorities clear - and it's time to make mine clear. I care about America's children, and I'm going to school district to school district, office to office, and taking back our schools. But I don't stand a chance without you. name: Derek Marshall
subject: Why this race is critical for Dems
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
We already know 2022 will be a big election year for Democrats. After two years under President Biden’s leadership, the country will face a referendum, and all eyes will be on whether Democrats can maintain our House majority. **We must remember that in 2020, we lost several Democratic seats and though we won the Presidency, the House majority shrank. **

With redistricting underway and undoubtedly gerrymandering in the process, some races will be harder for Democrats to win. **In California alone, we are expected to lose one Congressional seat.** That makes our race for California’s 8th even more critical. We CAN win and flip this district blue, and retain at least one spot in our House majority at the same time. **[Your donation now keeps us competitive through to Election Year. Can you chip in any amount to help?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37852312/312908199/-228151208?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGU1YTE0Ni0xYTM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A3T8ZH_dU2Yb0ZwReDawMIHt2H3Ck45xyJP3XXvu7Iw=)**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37852324/312908202/-228151208?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGU1YTE0Ni0xYTM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A3T8ZH_dU2Yb0ZwReDawMIHt2H3Ck45xyJP3XXvu7Iw=)

**It’s absolutely crucial that in next few years Democrats are able to execute on a big, bold agenda that actually address the scope of issues we are facing.** We need to pass climate action. We need to expand access to healthcare. We need to modernize our infrastructure and train millions of people in good-paying jobs to do it.

None of this can happen without the House majority we’ve been counting on. As our gridlocked Senate shows, the President can only do so much with one of the chambers of Congress passing legitimate legislation. **That’s why it’s so important that we flip California’s 8th District from red to blue and help protect the Democratic majority. **

**[This is a winnable campaign. We have the people power and the strategy, now we just need the resources to execute. Can we count on you to chip in one more time?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37852358/312908206/-228151208?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGU1YTE0Ni0xYTM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A3T8ZH_dU2Yb0ZwReDawMIHt2H3Ck45xyJP3XXvu7Iw=)**
In Solidarity,
**Derek Marshall**

**Peter -- this is a longer email but I hope you’ll read the whole thing.**

The four years with Trump as president were decidedly dark and seemingly hopeless.

But then, the American people stood up, rallied, and organized to put a good Democrat in the White House and secure Democratic majorities in both the House and the Senate.

Since then, I’ve been awestruck by how much we’ve been able to accomplish and move the needle on so many key progressive priorities -- COVID-19 aid, LGBTQ equality, environmental protections and so much more.

**But Peter, we can kiss this all goodbye if Democrats get complacent.**

MAGA Republicans are out for vengeance to take back the House AND the Senate -- they’re even trying to turn California red! And if they succeed -- all our progress will go down the drain.

Our successes in 2020 are only meaningful if we can keep our progressive majorities in 2022. _And that fight has already begun._

But what scares me the most is that our fundraising has come to a severe halt.

In fact, our campaign has only raised $3,000 towards our $10,000 October goal. And the month ends in just EIGHT days. [**So, Peter, I’m humbly asking you to chip in $3 (or more if you can), to help us catch up with the GOP and protect our House majority. Let’s show them what we’re made of. clean_body: Let’s show them what we’re made of. | = Peter -- this is a longer email but I hope you’ll read the whole thing. The four years with Trump as president were decidedly dark and seemingly hopeless. But then, the American people stood up, rallied, and organized to put a good Democrat in the White House and secure Democratic majorities in both the House and the Senate. Since then, I’ve been awestruck by how much we’ve been able to accomplish and move the needle on so many key progressive priorities -- COVID-19 aid, LGBTQ equality, environmental protections and so much more. But Peter, we can kiss this all goodbye if Democrats get complacent. MAGA Republicans are out for vengeance to take back the House AND the Senate -- they’re even trying to turn California red! And if they succeed -- all our progress will go down the drain. Our successes in 2020 are only meaningful if we can keep our progressive majorities in 2022. And that fight has already begun. But what scares me the most is that our fundraising has come to a severe halt. In fact, our campaign has only raised $3,000 towards our $10,000 October goal. And the month ends in just EIGHT days. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = In gratitude, Mark Takano Congressman, California's 41st District | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Box 5214, Riverside, CA 92517 www.marktakano.com Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. He's been a voice for veterans, seniors, students, local businesses and hardworking families. But now, our Democratic House Majority is seriously at risk. The leadership of progressive Democrats like Mark will be critical to holding Republicans accountable and ensuring the healing of our country during this challenging time. name: Charlie Crist
subject: Is Florida too red for us to win?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
Gov. Ron DeSantis is the worst of all the Trump proteges. |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37854689/312913528/601477077?refcode=20211023_p_1_fl&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzgzMzc2MS0xYzM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Myxx2r09R785u5spYCGdsiry4fCUylfDwpEyUjgTvb0=)
---

Friend,

Florida has always been a swing state -- but recently, I’ve heard folks say it’s swung too **red** for us to win.

**_They’re wrong._** Florida is a tough state to win, but I’ve done it before, and I can do it again. In fact, recent polls have me neck and neck with Gov. DeSantis! We can beat him -- but we have to do it together.

**Let’s show the doubters that we’re willing to fight for Florida: today, tomorrow, and every day between now and Election Day 2022.

[I need 5,000 grassroots Democrats to show their support for my campaign to defeat Gov. DeSantis and flip Florida blue. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37854690/312913529/311251446?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzgzMzc2MS0xYzM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Myxx2r09R785u5spYCGdsiry4fCUylfDwpEyUjgTvb0=&emci=db23b65c-4a33-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=27833761-1c34-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=8807089)**
[Sign the petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37854691/312913530/311251446?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzgzMzc2MS0xYzM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Myxx2r09R785u5spYCGdsiry4fCUylfDwpEyUjgTvb0=&emci=db23b65c-4a33-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=27833761-1c34-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=8807089)
---
**Gov. Ron DeSantis is the worst of all the Trump proteges.** He’s failed to lead on the COVID-19 pandemic, signed laws restricting abortion access, suppressed the vote, damaged Florida’s economy with his hyperpartisan actions, and refused to tackle the existential threat of climate change.

If Gov. DeSantis wins reelection and keeps Florida red, Republican governors across America will use him and his horrific record as a template in their own states.

**_We cannot allow that to happen._** **[Please add your name to my petition and publicly show that we need to keep fighting for Florida. Together, we can defeat Gov. DeSantis and turn Florida blue once more.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37854694/312913531/311251446?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzgzMzc2MS0xYzM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Myxx2r09R785u5spYCGdsiry4fCUylfDwpEyUjgTvb0=&emci=db23b65c-4a33-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=27833761-1c34-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=8807089)**

Thank you,
Charlie Crist

name: Senator Jacky Rosen
subject: We need to beat Spineless Dean Heller once again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Ex-Senator Dean Heller is at it again. He just announced he’s running for governor here in Nevada.
#
Team, have you seen the news?!
**Ex-Senator Dean Heller is at it again. He just announced he’s running for governor here in Nevada.**
In 2018, I defeated him after voters came together to put an end to his history of broken promises, send me to the Senate, and elect Steve Sisolak to the governor’s office. And now I’m asking for your help to stop Republicans like him once again.
We need leaders who will stand with everyday people, not Donald Trump. Dean follows Trump’s lead on spreading lies about our elections and working to take away our health care. He even said he wants to pass a Texas-style abortion ban here in Nevada. **One thing’s for sure: we can’t let him anywhere near the governor’s office.**
**[So today I’m reaching out directly to ask for your help to defeat Republicans like Dean Heller and elect Democratic governors everywhere. Please, will you split a contribution of $5 or more between my campaign and the Democratic Governors Association to help us meet our fundraising goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37854736/312913547/1902276168?refcode=jr_em_nd_211022_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODI5MGI2OC0xYzM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-w2VAX3GoFdsPZMnFoSNLdPzNhF_De8lKbrofDRJpIM=)**
Republican governors in Texas, Florida, Georgia, and more have signed laws this year to suppress the vote. Our democracy is under attack and we must do everything we can to protect voting rights. That means we've got to invest in building a grassroots effort to keep Democratic governors like Steve Sisolak in office and flip more red states blue.
There are 38 governors’ races between now and next November, including Nevada’s. Every election won means one more state protected from GOP attacks on voting rights, reproductive rights, and access to health care -- and every loss gives them an opening to take us backwards and undo our progress.
**Nothing is more important than protecting our fundamental rights and defending our nation’s values. So today, I'm writing to ask for your help in electing Democratic governors -- because the future of our democracy truly depends on it. We can’t afford to lose to Trump Republicans like Dean Heller. But we beat him once before, and with your help we can do it again.**
**[I’m counting on you -- will you make a split gift of $5 or more to my campaign and the Democratic Governors Association before the deadline to help stop Republicans and protect our Democratic leaders against GOP attacks? Every dollar you give brings us one step closer to our goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37854737/312913548/1902276168?refcode=jr_em_nd_211022_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODI5MGI2OC0xYzM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-w2VAX3GoFdsPZMnFoSNLdPzNhF_De8lKbrofDRJpIM=)**
Let's do this,
Jacky

**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37854738/312913549/1902276168?refcode=jr_em_nd_211022_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODI5MGI2OC0xYzM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-w2VAX3GoFdsPZMnFoSNLdPzNhF_De8lKbrofDRJpIM=)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Did You See This? - Progress Update from the Mississippi Center for Public Policy
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/progressupdate-8128452?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,

Our report on combating Critical Race Theory in Mississippi has received **enormous **public interest across local, state, and national media.

[_The Sun Herald_](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=9870b2adbe&e=5703353baa) & [_the Northeast Mississippi Daily Journal_](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=0b201458e3&e=5703353baa) ran opinion columns about it. Nationally, [_the Associated Press_](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=81cb46e2d0&e=5703353baa) wrote extensively about our report.
---
|
---
| However, for me, the icing on the cake was the fact that the ultra progressive [MSNBC](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=8f8e503b13&e=5703353baa) tried to run a hit piece on it.

**When THE leading progressive television channel nation-wide is attacking a state-level think tank, you know we’re on target and are helping move the dial of public opinion. **
Have a great weekend!
---
| |
---

Warm Regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

**Ps. The Heritage Foundation and the Mississippi Center for Public Policy have teamed up to bring you an event of Critical Race Theory here in Jackson Mississippi on November 9 th. [Please click here for details and come along!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=a8ff1a41ef&e=5703353baa)**

---
|
---

And I know that direction isn't going to come by just sitting around and waiting... so I decided to do my part to make this country a little better by running to bring the change myself to the U.S. Senate.

clean_body: | | | | We have the momentum. We have the grassroots support. We have it in the bag. Say it with us: Virginia is OURS for the taking. Virginia slipped right out of our hands just like Georgia did - but it's not over until it's over. All eyes are on this blue state that we're about to flip back to red. If we can win in Virginia, it will be a massive win for our party. Pollsters, pundits, and the Liberal Media are eager to see what happens because they know it will foreshadow what's to come... The opportunity to take back the House and the Senate. Congress BACK in Republican hands where we can advance a common sense conservative agenda. EXPRESS DONATE: | | | "Generic Button" House allies need this boost from a Virginia victory to make a grand slam in the midterms. If we win in Virginia - we can win back red districts that the Democrats flipped and add more Republicans to the House. Pollsters and pundits will use this as a sign of what's to come - if we fail Virginia, we will fail the rest of the country. The future of the Republican agenda rests on this state.Can we count on you to hold the line at this pivotal moment? "EXPRESS DONATE $5" "EXPRESS DONATE $10" "EXPRESS DONATE $15" "EXPRESS DONATE $20" We can't let the Democrats win again. They came for Georgia. They came for Texas. And now they're coming for Virginia. They 're even bringing in the big guns - Barack Obama, Jill Biden, and Stacey Abrams are all going to Virginia to surge the hopes of the liberal establishment. They're nervous and they know it's a tossup race. If we can garner enough support, we can win. And if we can do that... | | Team,

Anti-vaxxer and Trump’s favorite Senator Ron Johnson continues to outraise us. The more money he stockpiles, the harder it will be for us to win. We’re a people-powered grassroots campaign. **That means we are dependent on your support to be successful.**

Tom is dedicated to the people, not to Wall Street or mega-donors. If he’s elected, he will be a Democrat fighting for progressive values, not some disloyal corporate elitist like Joe Manchin or Kyrsten Sinema who would rather leave Congress in **complete gridlock** than do what the American people want.

If you’re ready for **real change** in D.C., please contribute to our campaign today:

body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Dear Peter,
I'm Holly McCormack and today I'm announcing my candidacy against Marjorie Taylor Greene for Georgia's 14th Congressional District. We are kicking off our campaign today by reaching out to you because we need your support. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc]
I am a mother, small businesswoman, and a community activist. I have lived in this District most of my life and the issues our residents are facing are not addressed with conspiracy theories.
Rush a donation today:
$5.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $50.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $10.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $75.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $25.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $100.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vvydox3IxDY [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vvydox3IxDY]Northwest Georgia is currently represented by someone who parachuted into the District just before the election because she thought it would be an easy win. She likes to make noise and fuel hate while ignoring the needs of those who actually live in our District. That is not who we are ! We need someone from our community who knows our struggles and who can stand up for us to get things done in Congress.
We need a leader who has values and empathy for everyone in her District, not just those with the loudest voices. Let's cut through the noise and get to work.
Check out our Website [http://www.hollyforcongress.org/] , Twitter [https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress] , and Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/] . We have a tough road ahead of us but with your help we can fire Marjorie. Donate $50 today and help me take Northwest Georgia back. I couldn’t do it without you. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc]
In solidarity,
Holly McCormack
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] Join the #MackPack [http://www.hollyforcongress.org/]
