name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Respectfully asking for your help, Peter (to reach more voters in all 67 PA counties!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Here’s the important next step of our organizing program.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20211023-3122-header&t=1&akid=3122%2E434096%2EBM60tY)
Peter,
You might have heard the news — we’ve got brand new, union-printed literature making the rounds through our campaign office! **This is a big deal, and the crucial next step in building out our robust organizing program.**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33891?refcode=em20211023-3122&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3122%2E434096%2EBM60tY)
**And when I say robust, Peter, I mean *really* robust. We’re hoping to hire a team of organizers to reach voters in _all_ of Pennsylvania’s 67 counties. That’s because our campaign believes deeply in the power of organizing, and we know it’s a crucial part of our strategy to put John in the U.S. Senate.**
That’s why in a minute, [** _I'm going to respectfully ask you to chip in $5 to directly fund our goal of hiring our team of organizers to get this fresh literature out on doors across Pennsylvania._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33891?refcode=em20211023-3122&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3122%2E434096%2EBM60tY)
Before I get to that, I wanted to make sure you're filled in on exactly what the plan is, what it's going to take to fund it:
Organizers reaching voters in every Pennsylvania county is Team Fetterman's strategy to go on offense when it comes to flipping this seat blue. We're planning to ramp up a *massive* voter outreach effort across all 67 counties. But first — we have to find the resources to make crucial hires in the hardest-to-reach counties in our Commonwealth.
**Basically, we've got to make sure we have the resources before we give this big expense the green light. 🚦**
[**_Can you chip in $5, or any amount that makes sense for you, to make these crucial hires across Pennsylvania and get our new literature on the doors? We're still not at our goal to fully-fund this plan, but we're really hoping we can get there before the month ends — especially with you on board._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33891?refcode=em20211023-3122&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3122%2E434096%2EBM60tY)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33891?refcode=em20211023-3122&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=3122%2E434096%2EBM60tY)**
We’re really getting after it, Peter. You know the drill: We’re registering voters, removing barriers between voters and the ballot, and getting out the vote. **You might even see a member of our team at your door!**
Thank you for being a part of this campaign, because none of this would be possible without you. See you out there!
Celeste
Celeste Trusty
Political Director
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211023-3122-footer&t=24&refcode2=3122_434096_BM60tY&akid=3122%2E434096%2EBM60tY)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=25&akid=3122%2E434096%2EBM60tY)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=3122%2E434096%2EBM60tY)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

subject: will you take a look at this map?

body:
It’s so important for us to have a rock-solid strategy for reaching voters in *every* single one of Pennsylvania’s counties
#

To elect Malcolm and take our fight for working people to the U.S. Senate, we’ve got to build a big, bold coalition that spans across the entire Commonwealth of Pennsylvania.
That’s why it’s so important for us to have a rock-solid strategy for reaching voters in *every* single one of Pennsylvania’s counties.
**So we wanted to share this map with you and talk about our path to victory. Take a look at this:**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37857984/312924095/-360183459?refcode2=e6f4e30b-2934-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211023-1-30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmY0ZTMwYi0yOTM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rcwpy4CGxaXYXv-v4ClHEmuaePforNDsnDCBtMfSV-A=)
That’s 67 counties, stretching from Philadelphia County in the lower right all the way to Erie County in the upper left.
It’s a huge amount of ground to cover — which means it’s going to take a tremendous amount of resources to run a huge grassroots organizing operation in 67 different counties.
And since this is a campaign powered by working people, Malcolm is counting on you to help fund our grassroots outreach program across Pennsylvania.
[So what do you say? Could you pitch in $3 today to support our work to build momentum behind our movement in all 67 of Pennsylvania’s counties?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37857985/312924096/-360183459?refcode2=e6f4e30b-2934-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211023-1-30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmY0ZTMwYi0yOTM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rcwpy4CGxaXYXv-v4ClHEmuaePforNDsnDCBtMfSV-A=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37857986/312924097/-360183459?refcode2=e6f4e30b-2934-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211023-1-30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmY0ZTMwYi0yOTM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rcwpy4CGxaXYXv-v4ClHEmuaePforNDsnDCBtMfSV-A=)**
Here’s something the map doesn’t tell you, though:
Unlike other state primaries, regional influences dominate every statewide primary in Pennsylvania for one clear reason — each candidate’s county of residence is printed on the ballot.
That means that every voter will know where each candidate is from when they vote, which has produced extremely regional voter coalitions in recent years.
That’s a HUGE plus for us, especially since a big part of voter turnout in this primary will be from Philadelphia and its surrounding areas — where Malcolm already has garnered a huge amount of support.
Additionally, momentum is building for Malcolm in the western side of the state. He’s been endorsed by a number of trusted leaders in the region, including Chardaé Jones, the current Mayor of Braddock, Pennsylvania.
That’s all thanks to you. Because of support from you and folks like you, we’ve built our campaign on a solid foundation.
**All we’ve got to do now is keep our foot on the gas and keep building our winning coalition — but it’s going to require all of us playing a part.**
[So, now that you have an inside look at our strategy to win this race and elect Malcolm Kenyatta as the champion working families need, will you please pitch in $3 to fuel our work?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37857987/312924098/-360183459?refcode2=e6f4e30b-2934-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211023-1-30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmY0ZTMwYi0yOTM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rcwpy4CGxaXYXv-v4ClHEmuaePforNDsnDCBtMfSV-A=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37857988/312924099/-360183459?refcode2=e6f4e30b-2934-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211023-1-30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmY0ZTMwYi0yOTM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rcwpy4CGxaXYXv-v4ClHEmuaePforNDsnDCBtMfSV-A=)**
We couldn’t do any of this without you. Thanks so much.
\- Team Malcolm

* * *
Paid for by Malcolm PAC

Our community is fed up with Doug LaMalfa and ready to see him go. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37858222/312925548/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGZkN2YxNC0yYjM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T6_7J_x0oTc0TVo4pryUgitaP9W3c9hRs6nKSbb8NIM=)
Friend,

If you've opened a local newspaper in the North State recently, this should come as no surprise: **Our community is fed up with Doug LaMalfa and ready to see him go.**

Just look at these highlights straight from the pages:
**"Change starts at home. Get rid of Doug LaMalfa"**
\- Joseph K., Nevada City

**"LaMalfa has not served our district well"**
\- Walter B., Chico

**"Shame on LaMalfa"**
\- Cheryl J., Chester

**"Doug LaMalfa is part of the problem in Washington and I will do all I can to see that he loses his next election."**
\- Rob D., Chico

**"LaMalfa's betrayal of our democracy must not be forgotten."**
\- _Record Searchlight_ editorial board
It’s not just Joseph, Walter, Cheryl, Rob, or even the _Record Searchlight_ editorial board either, friend. Max is talking with (and listening to) hundreds of voters across our community who are fed up and ready to see LaMalfa held accountable.

Our challenge is making sure they know that Max is the viable Democrat challenging LaMalfa. That's how we win.

**To continue spreading the word, we need your help on two fronts: 1) Raising the grassroots resources to fuel our communication efforts through mailboxes, digital ads, and TV and 2) Spreading the good word directly.**

That's why we're asking:

[**Will you chip in to help us send Doug LaMalfa packing and bring new representation to CA-01? body:
Election Day is just around the corner

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37858226/312925552/-793144256?refcode=dpva-em-211023-10days&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTViOGQwZC0yYjM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D62AGd65Avxya_gjq_Jhrp980HR9YRKgGo6ORMwcrBg=&emci=47da6560-1f34-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=015b8d0d-2b34-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15759664)

| | Hey there, y'all! As you know, it’s crunch time. We’re just 10 days away from Election Day and we have to make every moment count. Part of my job on the digital team is to make sure we’re bringing in enough money online to fully fund our ground game and mobilization efforts. **So many elections in Virginia have come down to a handful of votes and this one isn’t going to be an exception.** We still have 10 days left to persuade undecided voters and get Virginia Democrats to the polls, but to pull this off we need to continue to build one of the largest grassroots teams this Commonwealth has ever seen. That’s where you come in: We need to raise another $35,000 to expand our Get Out the Vote operations in key districts where we need to increase Democratic turnout between now and Election Day. To keep Virginia blue in this upcoming election we need to win everywhere — _especially in these key districts_ — and we can’t do that unless we hit our fundraising goals so that we can continue to ramp up our GOTV efforts. I’m reaching out to you and many other strong grassroots supporters like you, Derek, because your donation of $10 or $25 could be what helps us turn out the final votes we need. **[Will you join our grassroots team and chip in to help us mobilize Democratic voters across Virginia in these final few days?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37858228/312925555/272180825?refcode=dpva-em-211023-10days&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTViOGQwZC0yYjM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D62AGd65Avxya_gjq_Jhrp980HR9YRKgGo6ORMwcrBg=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: Election Day is just around the corner | | | Hey there, y'all! As you know, it’s crunch time. We’re just 10 days away from Election Day and we have to make every moment count. Part of my job on the digital team is to make sure we’re bringing in enough money online to fully fund our ground game and mobilization efforts. So many elections in Virginia have come down to a handful of votes and this one isn’t going to be an exception. We still have 10 days left to persuade undecided voters and get Virginia Democrats to the polls, but to pull this off we need to continue to build one of the largest grassroots teams this Commonwealth has ever seen. That’s where you come in: We need to raise another $35,000 to expand our Get Out the Vote operations in key districts where we need to increase Democratic turnout between now and Election Day. To keep Virginia blue in this upcoming election we need to win everywhere — especially in these key districts — and we can’t do that unless we hit our fundraising goals so that we can continue to ramp up our GOTV efforts. I’m reaching out to you and many other strong grassroots supporters like you, Derek, because your donation of $10 or $25 could be what helps us turn out the final votes we need. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ****=** **=** **=** **=** To protect the progress we’ve been making in the Commonwealth over the past few years we have to elect Democrats up and down the ballot, but we can’t do that if we aren’t raising the money to fund our operations. With your support we’re one step closer to making sure we keep the VA GOP’s Trumpian agenda out of the Commonwealth! We greatly appreciate you for showing up and being a part of this team, Rylie Cooper Democratic Party of Virginia ****=**** ****=****** | | Click here to . | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www.vademocrats.org. Friend,
Ranchers, Farmers, Oil & Gas Workers, Miners, Truckers, and Road Builders, are the backbone of the great state of Wyoming. The Federal Government issues regulations and mandates every day that are intended to strangle these industries, thereby increasing the cost of food, energy, and other goods... **We MUST deregulate, defund and defang the Administrative state.** The Biden Administration has destroyed everything that it has touched, including our supply chain. President Biden’s actions have disrupted our ability to timely deliver food and other goods, and intentionally reversed our move towards energy independence! Joe Biden has intentionally forced America to rely on foreign adversaries like Russia, China, Iran, and Venezuela for our Energy needs. He and his fellow Left-Wing Radicals intend to DESTROY good-paying energy jobs here in Wyoming. Our businesses should NOT be forced to put up with******bureaucratic micromanagement by unelected and unaccountable government employees****.** Regulation Without Representation does not and cannot work. Washington, DC does not have the answers; Wyoming does. STOP FEDERAL OVERREACH. clean_body: | | | | Wyoming First Friend, Ranchers, Farmers, Oil & Gas Workers, Miners, Truckers, and Road Builders, are the backbone of the great state of Wyoming. The Federal Government issues regulations and mandates every day that are intended to strangle these industries, thereby increasing the cost of food, energy, and other goods... We MUST deregulate, defund and defang the Administrative state. The Biden Administration has destroyed everything that it has touched, including our supply chain. President Biden’s actions have disrupted our ability to timely deliver food and other goods, and intentionally reversed our move towards energy independence! Joe Biden has intentionally forced America to rely on foreign adversaries like Russia, China, Iran, and Venezuela for our Energy needs. He and his fellow Left-Wing Radicals intend to DESTROY good-paying energy jobs here in Wyoming. Our businesses should NOT be forced to put up with****bureaucratic micromanagement by unelected and unaccountable government employees. Regulation Without Representation does not and cannot work. Washington, DC does not have the answers; Wyoming does. STOP FEDERAL OVERREACH. The citizens of Wyoming do not need to be told how to run our businesses or manage our property. This campaign is about putting Wyoming FIRST, and saying NO to BIG GOVERNMENT. I hope to have you on my team, Friend. For Wyoming, Harriet Hageman | | | |

name: Laura Loomer
subject: She’s stripping 2A rights from Republican “Traitors”
body:
I’m fuming mad over this woman who I call “Stalin in a Skirt.”
| | | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/IUpQwREEXR2892bFlsrz763TAA/K6xSWVpoVXS892XPWcGSLsgg) | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/IUpQwREEXR2892bFlsrz763TAA/K6xSWVpoVXS892XPWcGSLsgg) Patriot,

I’m fuming mad over this woman who I call “Stalin in a Skirt.”

I’m Laura Loomer, an investigative journalist who has exposed and confronted everyone from Ilhan Omar to Hillary Clinton.

Nikki Fried is running for Governor of Florida against Ron DeSantis – **and if she wins, she’ll be vying for the White House in no time**.

And that is terrifying!

Let me just SHOW you why:

| | [Want Laura to EXPOSE Nikki Fried?
THEN SUPPORT HER WORK!](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/IUpQwREEXR2892bFlsrz763TAA/K6xSWVpoVXS892XPWcGSLsgg)
---

This is just foul behavior by an elected official. Fried is currently Commissioner of Agriculture in Florida.

Now, for some reason the Ag Commissioner in Florida is in charge of issuing concealed carry permits. The elected position is supposed to be NON-PARTISAN for this very reason – to prevent political targeting of citizens.

As Nikki proudly said in her tweet, she is pre-emptively stripping the 2nd Amendment Rights of Florida citizens who have yet to be prosecuted, and in some cases, they haven’t even been charged with a crime!

She is revoking the permits of people who merely “participated” in the January 6th protests in Washington!

Simply attending a Trump rally is now grounds to get you stripped of your concealed carry permit if you’re a conservative in America!

| [Want Laura to EXPOSE Corrupt Politicians?
THEN SUPPORT HER WORK!](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/IUpQwREEXR2892bFlsrz763TAA/K6xSWVpoVXS892XPWcGSLsgg)
---

We’ve seen this before:

In the 1930’s, when coal workers in Appalachia revolted against their employers for horrendous treatment, politicians created the National Firearms Act, which levied at $200 tax stamp on automatic weapons – **that only the coal companies could afford**. Politicians used “mob violence” to scare the public into accepting the gun control laws.

In 1967, California lawmakers passed laws against the open carry of firearms after they were scared out of their wits by Black Panthers who protested with their guns on the steps of the State Capitol.

In 2005, New Orleans law enforcement worked with the ATF to seize the firearms of Hurricane victims and allowed them to rust in shipping containers for years!

| [Want Laura to EXPOSE Leftists in Office?
THEN SUPPORT HER WORK!](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/IUpQwREEXR2892bFlsrz763TAA/K6xSWVpoVXS892XPWcGSLsgg)
---

But there is only one time in our history that comes close to what Nikki Fried is doing.

And it was done in 1775 by British Lord Dunmore who was so terrified of “insurrection” that he seized the gunpowder of Virginia colonists.

One of those colonists was one of our Founding Fathers, Patrick Henry – and he wasn’t having it. Henry peacefully marched on Williamsburg to retrieve the gunpowder and Lord Dunmore fled in fear.

**If that scenario were to happen today, Nikki Fried would have Patrick Henry arrested and tried for Domestic Terrorism!**

| [ Want Laura to help save America from the Left?
THEN SUPPORT HER WORK!](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/IUpQwREEXR2892bFlsrz763TAA/K6xSWVpoVXS892XPWcGSLsgg)
---

Nikki Fried, like most Leftists, are cowards who would use the force of law (even illegally) to strip the rights and power of her political opposition.

And that’s exactly what Nikki is doing – but for political gain and to win the praise (and campaign contributions) from Leftists around the nation.

Let’s see what Nikki Fried has hiding in her closet. Let’s expose her hypocrisy and corruption.

And let’s (peacefully) put the fear of God into any other politicians who try to mimic her actions of attacking conservatives.

[**Support my work today with a donation of $17.76 or more and let’s show the public who Nikki Fried REALLY is!**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/IUpQwREEXR2892bFlsrz763TAA/K6xSWVpoVXS892XPWcGSLsgg)

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

| [ Want Laura to help save America from the Left?
THEN SUPPORT HER WORK!](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/IUpQwREEXR2892bFlsrz763TAA/K6xSWVpoVXS892XPWcGSLsgg)
---

LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

[View Web Version](https://libersend.loomered.com/w/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/jNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg/K6xSWVpoVXS892XPWcGSLsgg)

I can’t bear the thought.

I'll give it to you straight, Derek: GOP leaders are saying that registering 60,000 more Republican voters could hand Florida to the GOP _permanently_. I'm not giving up on Florida – but with Republicans pouring money into this race, I need to make critical investments right now. And I cannot afford to make those investments if I miss my critical $50,000 grassroots fundraising goal tonight.

clean_body: Republicans are trying to PERMANENTLY keep Florida red and flip the Senate. | | | Hi, Derek. I'm sorry for popping into your inbox like this – but I'm leaning on my strongest supporters because Republicans are trying to PERMANENTLY keep Florida red and flip the Senate. I'm fighting to defeat Marco Rubio and defend our Democratic majority in the Senate – but I just found out that the Republican National Committee is investing at least $10 MILLION in on-the-ground organizers to keep Florida RED for decades. I can’t bear the thought. I'll give it to you straight, Derek: GOP leaders are saying that registering 60,000 more Republican voters could hand Florida to the GOP permanently. I'm not giving up on Florida – but with Republicans pouring money into this race, I need to make critical investments right now. And I cannot afford to make those investments if I miss my critical $50,000 grassroots fundraising goal tonight. I can't thank you enough for your support. Congresswoman Val Demings | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Terry McAuliffe, please .

name: Nikki
subject: Quick weekend check-in
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Team--

I want to keep this brief because I’m sure you’re enjoying the weekend. It’s been a busy week in Florida, and this is my first chance to catch up on email.

You’re one of our top supporters, friend, so I wanted to put a couple of things on your radar.

I also know you’re getting fundraising asks right and left, and I don’t want to add to the pile. I know you agree that Ron DeSantis is incredibly dangerous, so if you have a few minutes or a few dollars, I’d love if you could chip in this weekend. Please use this unique link to donate: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-oct-21?refcode=1023weekend [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-oct-21?refcode=1023weekend]

One other thing: as our team wrote this week, we’re building a movement to reach voters across Florida, but we can’t do it without your help. If you’re interested in volunteering with Team Nikki--in person or remotely--please use this link to sign up: https://secure.ngpvan.com/Af0YqF_4-0yPWSXtOkQ_4w2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Af0YqF_4-0yPWSXtOkQ_4w2]

Thanks for your continued support--I’ll let you get back to your weekend!

Nikki

name: Erica and Deandrea
subject: New message for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Hey!
#
| | | | | | | | | | |
---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---
| Hey there, it’s Deandrea. I’m Erica’s campaign chair, and I wanted to add you to the group chat since we were talking about our October fundraising. Deandrea
Our campaign doesn’t stop even on the weekend y’all. Deandra and I just finished meeting with our finance team to do a deep dive into our October fundraising numbers, and the honest truth is — **we’re behind.** Erica |
| **We need exactly 546 contributions to make up our fundraising gap. That’s why I’ve got to ask:[Can you step up and contribute to our campaign? Whatever you can do would be HUGE.](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/23593?t=1&akid=575%2E3698%2Ebqz0mY)** Deandrea
This week I received the HUGE honor of an endorsement from the Elect Black Women PAC. Having the support of other Black women in politics is so meaningful and special. Here on Team Erica Smith (or as I like to call them — TEAM AWESOME) we’re hyped and ready to build off this endorsement but we need your help. Erica |
| ^^^ Yep, what Erica said. Being a part of Erica’s campaign gives me life because I’m helping elect a smart, motivated, grassroots, progressive Black woman to the Senate. And I’m here for more progressive Black women in leadership! Deandrea
We’re up against Republican AND establishment opponents. I am the ONLY candidate in this race who is fighting for a Green New Deal, criminal justice reform, reproductive rights, Medicare for All, and cancelling student loan debt. Erica |
| We DO NOT need anymore Joe Manchins or Krysten Sinemas y’all!! 🙅♀️ The only way we’re going to have a North Carolina that works for EVERYONE is by electing progressive representatives. Deandrea
That’s why I’m humbly asking: **[Can you make a contribution right now so we can close our fundraising gap of 546 contributions and finish out October strong?](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/23593?t=2&akid=575%2E3698%2Ebqz0mY)** Erica |
| **We rely on grassroots donors like you.** Thank you for everything you do! Until next time! **❤️** Deandrea
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/23594?refcode=em20211023-575&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=575%2E3698%2Ebqz0mY)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20211023-575-footer&t=22&refcode2=575_3698_bqz0mY&akid=575%2E3698%2Ebqz0mY)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=23&akid=575%2E3698%2Ebqz0mY)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=575%2E3698%2Ebqz0mY)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

subject: 🚨🚨 The socialists are coming! 🚨🚨
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7f64a950d758/i-was-just-at-our-southern-border-4978426?e=13f35c4add)
---
| |
---
| Socialism is right here in our backyard.

AS WE SPEAK, socialist AOC is in Buffalo campaigning for India Walton in her push to turn Buffalo into Venezuela.

When Democrats say they aren’t for socialism - they are lying.

AOC and India Walton want to defund our police, remove all personal accountability, raise your taxes and force you to pay for their socialist wish list - the list goes on and on.

Socialism isn’t something happening in a far-off country - it's happening right here in our backyard, right now. If we don’t act soon, socialists will take over our local and state offices and the House and Senate for good as well.
---
|
---
|
We are at a turning point - we need to send the socialists packing and defend our nation. We need to stop AOC and Nancy Pelosi in their tracks in 2022 and end their reign over our nation.

---
| [AMERICA WILL NEVER BE A SOCIALIST COUNTRY](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=95bfb79250&e=13f35c4add "AMERICA WILL NEVER BE A SOCIALIST COUNTRY")
---
| Not only, is the future of Western New York is on the line. The future of our nation is on the line.

As long as I’m in Congress, I’ll hold the line - you have my word.

Best,
Chris Jacobs

body:
These final days of get-out-the-vote efforts, last minute ads, phone calls, and door knocking will make or break the results on November 2. Friend, Virginia’s Democrat Attorney General Mark Herring has failed Virginians. When the Virginia Parole Board repeatedly broke the law, **_Mark Herring did nothing. _** When the Virginia Parole Board repeatedly failed to inform the victims of cop killers, child abductors, murderers, and rapists that their perpetrators were released decades early, **_Mark Herring said nothing. _** Virginians deserve a better attorney general – one who puts people over politics. **That is why I endorsed Republican Jason Miyares and it’s why I’m asking you to chip in $1 or more right away to help fund the final days of his campaign. ** [**SUPPORT JASON MIYARES NOW**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=b0f6e3c0236e45b4950ea58e6662f17b&_e=8lGMvEJ804sy9k3mOJWPWMuFWDZTStTFjF0AAEMVkRQXjQAvY_7bUATY2WaP-jSUZXDY8Jo2uPh4qGsZ6TgykEbNgv8ipLvqGlUa2VBpUdbZORDsiR7kU4cLDLmHmxdrq-kKn7PYBpTi1qsbtLwjxSLtDeBYNty6sg-jIGAFEgrIhSzhLbaXZMiDcao-OwhPB5bWnBj3LRad2VpOWvbm0S0s91_o1RdDlLstJ5RdIE48J5oimq6SJruEhkMkL5eLipdLnv5IKHODEs2KnnAGKpFIV4Gir6_3QLJDjq3PPxRdHX08KqsC1LKPmkXiw-YwllF_f6pQEBN2bzp67VqcYa9xusbpYIwEcXYFXoS3p4TtRQKE4eOA9sgUy4wEmFq66jQkuhwuBKg5mSQ65AsBKqJdkw3BDnfDNSuReA-WkUGy8E1AZtQaZlBu8lhwot5Sz49asbKhLrfmVKCjk1_jb89ocbx4ZUg8SHZQhiv5OTbdp_ciJUaMleUoN5C9Lc9b) With just 10 days left until Election Day and early voting already underway, Jason needs all of the support possible. To make matters more pressing, polls have Jason and Mark’s race in a dead-heat. A recent poll showed that Independents now favor Republicans by1 POINT to FLIP the House from Pelosi’s control. And with only 5 SEATS needed to get the job done, we’ve reached a pivotal moment in our fight. The map of Texas’ brand-new congressional districts was just released, and U.S. Army Captain Wesley Hunt’s race for the NEW 38th district is 1 of just 5 seats we need to flip the House. But Wesley is counting on grassroots conservatives like YOU to ensure we win this race. I endorsed Wesley because he’s exactly the kind of candidate we need to put the House back into conservative hands. Wesley is a true patriot who shares my belief in our country’s potential and is living proof of the everlasting American Dream. As an Army combat veteran, husband, and father of two, Wesley will work to secure our elections, keep Critical Race Theory out of our schools, and work to end the Biden border crisis. clean_body: We can’t let them get away with this... | Friend, I simply had to reach out one last time to see if I can count on you to add your name to this critical petition. It’s truly despicable that Joe Biden and Kamala Harris’ Department of “ Justice ” would use the FBI to target parents who speak out against critical race theory. We MUST put a stop to this draconian measure for the sake of every parent who still believes they ought to have a say in their child’s education. Joe Biden and Kamala Harris have weaponized the Justice Department, which has now instructed the FBI to mobilize against parents who vocally oppose critical race theory. It’s despicable and un-American that the Left would try to SILENCE parents who believe they know what’s best for their own children -- NOT the government. Status:[Pending] I recently called out the University of Wisconsin-Madison and University of Wisconsin-River Falls for the vile critical race theory and anti-police rhetoric they espouse. I REFUSE to back down in the fight to keep leftist propaganda out of our schools. But Friend, this latest move by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris to weaponize the Justice Department and the FBI is truly unprecedented... | **Weekly Newsletter ******
---
_**Note from Chairman Stepanek **_**_Weekly Governor's Glance _****_Upcoming Events _****_House Republican Update _****_Senate Republican Update _****_Republican Spotlight_**** _Noteworthy News_**** _NHGOP Tweets _
****NH Federation of Republican Women****NH Young Republicans****NH Federation of College Republicans**** **
---
|
---
| **Derek,****

****First off I would like to congratulate Jodi Nelson on her successful Special Election primary win in Derry this past week! Jodi ran a phenomenal campaign, and was active and energized from day one. We look forward to working with her to keep that momentum going through the general election on December 7th. Read more about Jodi below as she is also this week’s Republican of the Week!****

I would also like to wish candidate Rita Mattson luck in her general election occurring on October 26th - only a few days away! Rita has worked hard to connect with voters and I encourage everyone to chip in to help her in these final days of campaigning.

There are multiple campaigns around the state we have the opportunity to get involved with, and I encourage every single one of us to make a point to do so. We must encourage Republican leadership on all levels, whether it be for School Board, State Representative or Congress in order to combat the radical policies of Democrat Politicians. Just this week we saw Senator Maggie Hassan proudly touted the endorsement of an organization that wants to defund the police with zero concern for the safety of our fellow Granite Staters. Click each graphic below to be directed to the candidates homepage. Additionally, help us combat this destructive narrative and set the record straight by supporting the party **[**HERE**](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fdonate/1/0100017cadb462d6-521f0984-b1fe-4c2d-9dd8-ea8b8d0853d8-000000/Bzv0outlWnvnM0fitsUI9-RutOk=241)**.

****In closing, I would like to take a moment of remembrance for three special Granite Staters who passed away this week. My sincerest condolences to the family and loved ones of Congressman Bill Zeliff, Hon. Nancy Elliot and Pastor Rob Haynes - our hearts are with you. **

---
---
| **Stephan Stepanek
NHGOP Chairman **

| **House Republicans and Friends Across New Hampshire,

I want to offer my sincerest congratulations to Jodi Nelson on winning the Derry Primary. With our slim majorities in Concord, we need Conservatives like Jodi to help us continue to deliver on campaign promises that we made to Granite Staters. When your Democrat opponent has voted for wasteful budget spending and an income tax, the choice could not be any clearer, Derry citizens and Granite Staters need Jodi.Especially considering the daily bombardment of Biden overreach that the federal government and the Democrat Party is attempting, we need every reinforcement that we can get to preserve our Live Free or Die liberties. I urge all of our friends and allies to do everything that they can to help us deliver another Republican victory on December 7th.Whether it is making phone calls to voters, knocking on doors, or holding signs and watching polls on election day, every bit of help will bring us one step closer to expanding our majorities.
All the best, **

**Jason Osborne, House Majority Leader**

| | Today's Republican Spotlight shines on Candidate Jodi Nelson who just won Derry‘s Special Election Primary!

Jodi ran a terrific campaign and we hope you'll take a moment to get to know her platform and sign up to assist in her before the general election on December 7th!

| **The New Hampshire Federation of College Republicans is the officially chartered state organization for College Republicans all over the state of New Hampshire. With chapters at Saint Anselm College, Plymouth State, UNH, SNHU, Dartmouth, Franklin Pierce, and Keene State, the NHFCR has representation for a wide swath of the state. Executive board members include Chairman Ben Mickens, Executive Director Joseph LaCreta, Vice-Chair for CD1 Nate Twarog, Vice-Chair for CD2 John Michitson, Treasurer Kevin Chrisom, and Secretary Jessica Long. Our chapters are driven to keep college students engaged with conservative politics by bringing speakers to campus, presenting students with conservative internship opportunities in the state, and doing grassroots campaigning. The Federation board looks forward to helping get our chapters to a post-COVID reality while we work to keep Republican leadership in Concord as we push for Republican leadership in DC. **

subject: Sheriffs Stand with Derek

body:
This past week, five sheriffs from all across Kansas stepped up to share their support for Derek’s campaign for governor. As the chief law enforcem Friend, **This past week, five sheriffs from all across Kansas stepped up to share their support for Derek’s campaign for governor. ** As the chief law enforcement official in Kansas, Derek knows exactly what it means to support the men and women in blue, and is entirely committed to equipping them with the tools they need to serve and protect Kansans.
It’s no wonder why so many sheriffs have already shared their support for Derek, including more this week. We wanted to share some of their words with you, [_**and invite you to stand with them.**_](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=64620973431b45d981f865654f8c2382&_e=M-vSpSc0llk5N7x2V2OJvjWqchtwc4tWANOFIxvgYOrZ684K7TD2iZmI_3MYlkZUuML1zNkxKptSElWwTUKp9JR9HamwKG6ljTPGLtYxBdaX9f-AzuQ0wnE_JOuPHabSiFwJ6St4VMsTTyc6WYexqKKMtapoZYKYn3LXIhEx2AKDlBOjKWxH60BGz7qdacF0Na9H7Lbl_44K2bmeWo3C_c7RHH8YVn9KefQgoqGlyhBuXlW5Pp-5uYV8QDBAwrYEh2fbElGvc6UMnXw9j7kzHzS8PJdk-j2ITyg1iF1WYRk_MTwfUzlSqrLMat8zJU1OzhrpdxLY-tEsThKcmh8_zgXpCkwnd7FU_YMV0Z-00boIGPAWTx6GXi30NT6A5qifB8ikaXU94GbjE4Uqph9KuqaFMD1LAMwU7_7qBBZ26IP6Grz4Wpco4K7f9-kP7y_BsiYod15rln-gOYl5So4qQigV26oW7Oak9mPb91tYpK54mwUUxUOWmbCMhadNeZG1) [**WIN WITH DEREK**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=64620973431b45d981f865654f8c2382&_e=M-vSpSc0llk5N7x2V2OJvjWqchtwc4tWANOFIxvgYOrZ684K7TD2iZmI_3MYlkZUuML1zNkxKptSElWwTUKp9JR9HamwKG6ljTPGLtYxBdaX9f-AzuQ0wnE_JOuPHabSiFwJ6St4VMsTTyc6WYexqKKMtapoZYKYn3LXIhEx2AKDlBOjKWxH60BGz7qdacF0Na9H7Lbl_44K2bmeWo3C_c7RHH8YVn9KefQgoqGlyhBuXlW5Pp-5uYV8QDBAwrYEh2fbElGvc6UMnXw9j7kzHzS8PJdk-j2ITyg1iF1WYRnMilwRDrhpmuDeGLY74MUPvwzxLxCXae0Hko6TdVorGsbPU3UNDK7rtYHFbkctHU-HbYuyDzF6Kw3KLLSq621rbxbb9LVai-MK5RiV9ZIhvT7A3-GIsFugm7BqNvABgkk2uinU6tRO1AodeD6k6NTkJ4ujR7XlwFC_CC1VxeUj84rGUiQyMPS2XvKwhY1-zi_JUA0HxhTwhBr0v_Qc_KHN) _“I’ve known Derek Schmidt for ten years, and I’m a huge supporter and know he will be a great governor for the State of Kansas. Derek has always been pro-law enforcement, which I greatly appreciate as someone who has spent 39 years as a police officer and now five as county sheriff. Derek always shows up, he’s Johnny on the job - when we need him, he’s there quick to respond with helpful information and necessary action. I’m happy to encourage all Kansans to support him.”_ **_–Sheriff Jerry Montagne, McPherson County_** _“As Attorney General, Derek has worked tirelessly to make Kansas a better place to live. I have no doubt that as Governor he will work just as hard. Derek is the leader we need in Kansas now more than ever.”_ **_–Sheriff Cole Presley, Graham County_** _“I am honored to give my endorsement to Derek Schmidt to be the next Governor of Kansas. I have had the opportunity to work for Derek as a KBI Agent and with him as Sheriff. Derek has kept victims of crime as one of his highest priorities and continues to support law enforcement here in Kansas.”_ **_–Sheriff David Falletti, Cowley County_** _“I’ve known Derek for several years and he’s always served Kansas well. He’s a law and order guy, and throughout his service to our state he’s demonstrated a steadfast dedication to upholding the constitution and rule of law - as opposed to too many others serving in government today who disregard it. He will be a breath of fresh air for Kansas and I’m proud to endorse him as governor.”_ **_–Sheriff Jeff Richards, Franklin County_** _“I enthusiastically endorse Derek Schmidt for Governor because he has demonstrated true leadership as attorney general and fought for all Kansans. Derek has been and continues to be a staunch supporter of Kansas law enforcement and believes in the principles of law and order. A true conservative, Derek will serve Kansas with honor and respect.”_ **_Sheriff Andy Dedeke, Leavenworth County_** [**Will you join Team Schmidt by chipping in just $5 right now**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=64620973431b45d981f865654f8c2382&_e=M-vSpSc0llk5N7x2V2OJvjWqchtwc4tWANOFIxvgYOrZ684K7TD2iZmI_3MYlkZUuML1zNkxKptSElWwTUKp9JR9HamwKG6ljTPGLtYxBdaX9f-AzuQ0wnE_JOuPHabSiFwJ6St4VMsTTyc6WYexqKKMtapoZYKYn3LXIhEx2AKDlBOjKWxH60BGz7qdacF0Na9H7Lbl_44K2bmeWo3C_c7RHH8YVn9KefQgoqGlyhBuXlW5Pp-5uYV8QDBAwrYEh2fbElGvc6UMnXw9j7kzHyhHphBG0FMn7u0ugNywzl-2Q6vqt1av5CvirgKGyDlJya6F_JwSSpSTd3ojbEiO-_26KpFQSwJCa97ltlNCpMkbe7Z2A1hatmQ003v77gu0RB5pDxBTU3TqXQ4JHBQFHTnMjzk1gfw9UYeXK5436SnIwul0bXTvkkJrmQZgwnHMTVteMftz0nYoVEzSZfmrvJA3AlzHhtQ7Izl-CTNm52AiLxVf7mu4sF9tJ4jFCmlM) to help our team work toward replacing Laura Kelly and her liberal policies with a trusted conservative leader? [**DONATE NOW**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=64620973431b45d981f865654f8c2382&_e=M-vSpSc0llk5N7x2V2OJvjWqchtwc4tWANOFIxvgYOrZ684K7TD2iZmI_3MYlkZUuML1zNkxKptSElWwTUKp9JR9HamwKG6ljTPGLtYxBdaX9f-AzuQ0wnE_JOuPHabSiFwJ6St4VMsTTyc6WYexqKKMtapoZYKYn3LXIhEx2AKDlBOjKWxH60BGz7qdacF0Na9H7Lbl_44K2bmeWo3C_c7RHH8YVn9KefQgoqGlyhBuXlW5Pp-5uYV8QDBAwrYEh2fbElGvc6UMnXw9j7kzHzS8PJdk-j2ITyg1iF1WYRnFI4_uP9k87cfxO2pMylNq5OTEHXlJ5WzfeAD4U0SqTtKm9nC1-g07xDLFkVlyMsRjHdJmjKjUbg7zHym3AFPA-FSBOAOx28y2ZwePgK_0wnTB4ZdjNnnzM83Rfs_ZcLcKXyBa04GHHaP_6Bgg2DzHZZqc4il0zhUYouEZXOBkuIhGiYfDqInR4-_t5FBiKPV3ZGldaql5rkmpBqCjQdMH) Thanks, Team Schmidt | |

Friend,

Cutting straight to the chase ---

_**I am DEEPLY worried about the state of America’s finances.**_

The Radical Left simply cannot be trusted to handle the finances of the most powerful country in the **WORLD. They are reckless, clueless, and WASTEFUL.**

_Honestly, I’d trust a drunken sailer more than Liberals to handle my money._

We MUST Take Back the Senate majority or else we will be paying the consequences for generations to come. I’m not letting the Democrats ruin the future for my children and grandchildren.

The Radical Left simply cannot be trusted to handle the finances of the most powerful country in the WORLD. They are reckless, clueless, and WASTEFUL. Honestly, I’d trust a drunken sailer more than Liberals to handle my money. We MUST Take Back the Senate majority or else we will be paying the consequences for generations to come. I’m not letting the Democrats ruin the future for my children and grandchildren. | Thank you and God Bless, Mike Braun Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana Don't want to receive our emails anymore?

Hey there,

Sorry to bug you so late, but I wanted to let you know that there are only 10 days until Election Day. My campaign just told me that we are running low on the final resources that we need for the next 10 days.

Terry McAuliffe is scared, and that means he is going to pull every trick in the book to make sure he wins this race.

I will not let that happen, but I need to make sure that I have the funds to put the resources we need in place.

_**[We have so much momentum and this race is so close. Now, more than ever before, I need your help. Can you chip in $10 ( or whatever you can) to help me out?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58597281:JQKQz72Nm:m:1:3253819041:A0E5FE6D71F9E4896BD3C1EDFCE8E1E6:r)**_ | | [**CHIP IN -> $10**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58597282:JQKQz72Nm:m:1:3253819041:A0E5FE6D71F9E4896BD3C1EDFCE8E1E6:r)

Your support means the world to me, and I wouldn't be here without you.

Thank you.

Let's go win this!

Glenn

Terry McAuliffe is scared, and that means he is going to pull every trick in the book to make sure he wins this race.

I will not let that happen, but I need to make sure that I have the funds to put the resources we need in place.

_**[We have so much momentum and this race is so close. Now, more than ever before, I need your help. Can you chip in $10 ( or whatever you can) to help me out?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58599926:JcMmz72N5:m:1:3298722022:E2D53A43AD6F3024FF8C6DF04086DE54:r)**_ | | [**CHIP IN -> $10**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58599927:JcMmz72N5:m:1:3298722022:E2D53A43AD6F3024FF8C6DF04086DE54:r)
---
Your support means the world to me, and I wouldn't be here without you.

Thank you.

Let's go win this!

Glenn

_Sent from Glenn 's iPhone_

Your individual medical decisions are exactly that: your own.**The White House has zero right to enforce unconstitutional vaccine mandates on American citizens.** **Sign your name on our petition saying NO to vaccine mandates!**

**Peter, I just finished up a rally with President Obama in Richmond!** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37860391/312937757/-1547699132?amount=3&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,50&refcode=HAFV_20211023_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWQwMWViMy0zYjM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HByqC5ZFttQFE2E_GoG_ixOZ2Ts6WdwqTJv0QGacPZo=) And as he said, Virginia has a lot of responsibility this year.

| | Derek, We’re only 10 days away from Election Day and we all know the stakes. Virginia has made so much progress since my time in the State Senate, but now the Republican ticket is campaigning on rolling back all of the policies that have made Virginia into the welcoming and thriving Commonwealth we’re all proud of. With Democratic control of the House, Senate, and Governor’s office we’ve been able to accomplish so much. We’ve abolished the death penalty, codified voting rights for all Virginians, installed protections for the LGBTQ community, raised the minimum wage, welcomed thousands of refugees and immigrants, ratified the ERA, taken down the Confederate statues in Richmond — _just imagine how much more we could accomplish with 4 more years!_ Listen, Derek — this election is going to be a close one. We have to do everything we can between now and November 2nd to make sure we’re getting Democrats across Virginia to the polls. **My friends over at the DPVA have been working tirelessly to get out the vote but they need your help, Derek. With just over a WEEK until the Virginia elections, a national GOP group is dropping a **_MILLION DOLLAR ATTACK AD._**

First it was the Koch network -- now it’s another shadowy Republican group!

This close to the election, with polls tied, Republicans gaining momentum, and Democratic enthusiasm at an all time low, a huge attack ad like this **_could spell doom for Democrats._**

[**This is an all hands on deck moment, Derek! Will you pitch in $25 or whatever you can afford to help us match this? body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37861554/312945234/1105481330?code=jtk322-su-nd&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fabby4iowa-endorser%3Fcode%3Djtk322-su-nd&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzY1OWFlNS00NDM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0a4xdXEF4C2iqLB1aHdmfNuWFkv78vZCq5vIcvA_oq8=&emci=2e1515ba-ce30-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=e7659ae5-4434-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=13784334)
Hey, Peter: it's Daniel, Abby's husband. Last month, I reached out and asked you to officially endorse Abby in her campaign against Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA). I'm excited to share that we received an overwhelming number of endorsements. Just take a look at all the names on our Digital Endorsement Wall below!
But now that Donald Trump has given Sen. Grassley his "complete and total endorsement," we've got to raise the stakes: **We need another 10,000 new endorsements before 11:59 p.m. tonight to show that this team is fired up and ready to win.** **[If you don't see your name on the wall, can you take a moment to endorse Abby right now? She's counting on you being in her corner.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37861555/312945235/1105481330?code=jtk322-su-nd&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fabby4iowa-endorser%3Fcode%3Djtk322-su-nd&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzY1OWFlNS00NDM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0a4xdXEF4C2iqLB1aHdmfNuWFkv78vZCq5vIcvA_oq8=&emci=2e1515ba-ce30-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=e7659ae5-4434-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=13784334)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37861556/312945236/1105481330?code=jtk322-su-nd&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fabby4iowa-endorser%3Fcode%3Djtk322-su-nd&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzY1OWFlNS00NDM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0a4xdXEF4C2iqLB1aHdmfNuWFkv78vZCq5vIcvA_oq8=&emci=2e1515ba-ce30-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=e7659ae5-4434-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=13784334)
After decades of Sen. Grassley's failed leadership, Iowans are ready for change. I'm not speaking figuratively here: Polling shows 64% of voters don't want to reelect him! **This is our moment in Iowa, and Abby is the only person for the job.**
There's no one out there who's going to fight harder to defeat Sen. Grassley than Abby, because there's no one who's going to fight harder for her community than Abby. After all, when a derecho with hurricane-force winds hit Iowa last year, it was Abby who was out there handing out food and water, comforting her community and making sure that the people she served were heard. Sen. Grassley didn't show up for days.
**Abby knows leadership isn't about a title or about how many terms you have under your belt. It's about your actions: whether you show up for your community, or whether you don't.** From helping her community after the derecho to serving in the Iowa House of Representatives at only 26 years old, Abby's been showing up for Iowa.
That's the leadership that Iowans deserve, but we're up against the entire force of the GOP establishment, including the Senate GOP campaign arm's more than $25 million war chest. They're going to do everything they can to stop Democratic challengers like Abby, so she's counting on a surge in grassroots support. **[That's why, before our midnight deadline tonight, she needs to know that you're with her. Grassley his "complete and total endorsement," we've got to raise the stakes: We need another 10,000 new endorsements before 11:59 p.m. tonight to show that this team is fired up and ready to win. After decades of Sen. Grassley's failed leadership, Iowans are ready for change. I'm not speaking figuratively here: Polling shows 64% of voters don't want to reelect him! This is our moment in Iowa, and Abby is the only person for the job. There's no one out there who's going to fight harder to defeat Sen. Grassley than Abby, because there's no one who's going to fight harder for her community than Abby. After all, when a derecho with hurricane-force winds hit Iowa last year, it was Abby who was out there handing out food and water, comforting her community and making sure that the people she served were heard. Sen. Grassley didn't show up for days. Abby knows leadership isn't about a title or about how many terms you have under your belt. It's about your actions: whether you show up for your community, or whether you don't. From helping her community after the derecho to serving in the Iowa House of Representatives at only 26 years old, Abby's been showing up for Iowa. That's the leadership that Iowans deserve, but we're up against the entire force of the GOP establishment, including the Senate GOP campaign arm's more than $25 million war chest. name: National Republican Polling
subject: Bring Constitution 101 to your home
body:
a
I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD b
_Sponsored message_
| | | This sponsored message from National Republican Polling is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zq0e090uh3pc3b0as7uvngjl6ip23jn9lt1cph9o_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c1h64o72chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z23h2e8dtoim779l24qn4arakdon8ium897enfs8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c1h64o72chh2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zh54a2n2q6p7rp64plcdbbt2kh3f0iqlpj1djqd0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c1h64o72chh2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844
---
Hillsdale College 33 East College Street Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: There are no "off year" elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
I'm working to make sure western Pennsylvania votes for a top-notch slate of candidates on November 2nd.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37861645/312945817/1796049497?refcode=EM_C_211023DB_N_CD_6_G_N_Logo&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGZiNDM0Yi00NjM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KejpC1cFxEB6CbgNoTdFCrCw9hQm1O1VE12x39mjRPw=)
---
Derek,

It's important that local Democrats win their races in western Pennsylvania this year. Their success will set the stage for building the party infrastructure that we'll need in 2022.

There's no such thing as an "off year" — that's why I've recently been lending a hand to Democrats up and down the ballot as Election Day approaches. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37861646/312945818/1796049497?refcode=EM_C_211023DB_N_CD_6_G_N_P2&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGZiNDM0Yi00NjM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KejpC1cFxEB6CbgNoTdFCrCw9hQm1O1VE12x39mjRPw=) I'm working to make sure western Pennsylvania votes for a top-notch slate of candidates on November 2nd.

We won't stop working to bring it home over the next 10 days. Together, we're going to send a strong message that the momentum is on our side, and that Pennsylvania Democrats are fired up for all the fights that lie ahead.

Best,

Chris

P.S. If you're registered in Pennsylvania and haven't yet voted, [please make a plan to vote](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37861647/312945819/-1612268846?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGZiNDM0Yi00NjM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KejpC1cFxEB6CbgNoTdFCrCw9hQm1O1VE12x39mjRPw=&emci=a956d80d-3b34-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=74fb434b-4634-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=13185894) before November 2nd! | | | **Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy.** ****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37861648/312945820/1796049497?refcode=EM_C_211023DB_N_CD_6_G_N_BioBox&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGZiNDM0Yi00NjM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KejpC1cFxEB6CbgNoTdFCrCw9hQm1O1VE12x39mjRPw=)****

name: Brian Hawkins
subject: I’m a black pastor exposing the truth about BLM
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hawkins for Congress
body:
Democrats know they can no longer use physical force to enslave black Americans as they once did. Now, they use the media and culture to oppress us an Democrats know they can no longer use physical force to enslave black Americans as they once did. Now, they use the media and culture to oppress us and convince us that we are still victims. The truth is politicians are making millions off this scheme and that is their only motive. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b5d7a6b590514000815176f5814bc75a&_e=Ghrs__xS0invkKm-Bx80RpSIjKDgymICAiCetGSLxLMHY-ud4luVa59LMs5x4bNkRqiKVHd-CKWb2vr3M7AEH9G9YNjJ9XQuyCjRo3miB57SwEyWk0p9QaXYPfcIho0ocgQsg46nUM-d3uD9YP0ynjuTulLvN_SqqA_f5VMQpkVRzu36zW58aZP4Nf66ihVlFQgO_Z6Fd53FQ5pR2_fQ_Sj6S0KPaQWdFqRQFoiG9NxphyqncrLWdGiC_4DFmBH7ZDWi2JYATkPLJyo3MT_cgzW9VMKl5alCSrV3bDGvCQWzzIOkciwaw7ySi9ybrYppH2DXOIph9nyV1bT7pZL4Jrp6XYXXojXFL1r_NX3-3tdg6PNQbBrFd_myFpbYr_IcrtY29Bjj2mXLT0CAjNthWq9TtXJP8xf5BD5lo0E8CFU-8dg3EQvCuZBu2KOQ2ZG-Q5n_2hI4tUbhV54wNbmTIGugamEGdn5roaz9F2lZ3rk%3D)
---
Peter,

My name is Brian Hawkins. I am a black, conservative pastor running for Congress. Although I am African American, as you can see from my photo above, I do NOT support the Black Lives Matter organization, _let me tell you why._

But first, let me warn you: What I am about to say will get me labeled as an “Uncle Tom” by the radical-Left. name: Tom Brejcha
subject: 9 felonies for exposing Planned Parenthood
body:
I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c415%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=DlRpt0oWNNL8H7U2O7deZA&sysid=1)
Dear Friend, I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot. You may remember David as the undercover journalist who spent 30 months investigating and capturing video evidence of Planned Parenthood 's top leadership --- medical directors, national program directors, even its Senior Director of Medical Services -- **callously negotiating the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts.** **And now, he’s been charged with nine bogus felonies.** **[Which is why I’m asking you to make an emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66227%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kzWFkyjXnwPys%2bFhjLsVZQ&sysid=1)** You see, after David released the shocking videos of the illegal and disgusting actions of abortion executives, Kamala Harris, then California's Attorney General, colluded with Planned Parenthood to file felony charges against David... _**... Kamala Harris even ordered the California Department of Justice to raid David's home and confiscate his unpublished videos.**_ I won't sugarcoat it. If not cleared of these charges, David faces steep fines and years in state penitentiary and the consequences of being a convicted felon. While Kamala Harris --- a bought-and-paid-for ally of the abortion industry --- is sitting one heartbeat away from the presidency. That's the bad news. But here's the good news... David is fighting back. In fact, he's taking another opportunity to drag more of Planned Parenthood's dark criminality into the spotlight with two new federal lawsuits. That's right. The Thomas More Society has filed a federal civil rights lawsuit in California on behalf of David against former California Attorney General and now VicePresident Kamala Harris for prosecuting David in bad faith, twisting and perverting California's anti-eavesdropping law to persecute a citizen journalist because of his political views. Then the Thomas More Society filed a defamation (libel) lawsuit in federal court in New York against Planned Parenthood, which said David created a "fake" and "false" "smear campaign" against Planned Parenthood. In other words, the best defense is a good offense. The truth is we could no longer let David suffer such a trampling of his free speech and due process rights without a counterattack. The timing couldn't be more important. This is a critical opportunity to put Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the rest of the abortion industry on trial for conspiring to silence David in order to cover-up their illegal activities. **[That's where your emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND comes in --- by giving today you can stand with David in his hour of need.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66228%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fQ8J56bMco0vAbc5XMBMow&sysid=1)** The reality is. . . You couldn't be there when David entered the dark underbelly of the abortion industry --- sitting across the table from abortionists haggling over the price of baby body parts with cold-blooded clarity... "I want a Lamborghini." You couldn't be there as David saw with his own eyes the preborn children who had been killed with great precision and delicacy to preserve their organs for maximum profit. You couldn't be there when the videos were released and Kamala Harris and Planned Parenthood conspired to crush David with trumped up legal charges and an armed raid on his home in which they seized laptops, hard-drives, and recording equipment. And you couldn't be there with David (our criminal defense team was there) when he voluntarily appeared in both Texas and California for booking and processing --- fingerprinted and photographed for a mugshot like a common criminal. But, now, this is the reality... there is something you can do. **[You can make an emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND to help vindicate this pro-life hero.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66229%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9xjVZBBpAxTu%2bJBST7U6lg&sysid=1)** My name is Tom Brejcha. I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society --- a not-for-profit law firm underwriting and helping to spearhead David's criminal defense. The Thomas More Society is proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, former Kansas Attorney General Phill Kline, the March for Life, and many more. Because when dark forces like Planned Parenthood unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- **we fight back.** I have to tell you, despite all that David is facing, his spirits remain high. Of course, I've never known anyone in this kind of position who didn't feel an empty pit in his stomach. But David's not giving up. His willingness to fight back is a true profile in Pro-Life courage. Now I'll get right down to it... **We anticipate David's legal defense will cost us more than $6 million. That's right, SIX MILLION DOLLARS.** In addition to the criminal case and the new federal civil rights and defamation lawsuits, we're currently representing David in THREE other cases.
* The civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood where we are appealing the jury's verdict, along with the judge's order permanently banning David from doing any more undercover journalism against Planned Parenthood. Recently, we posted a $700,000 appeal bond to keep Planned Parenthood’s nasty collection agents from harassing him with collection agents and even seizing his belongings. We’re fighting back, but we’ll need your help.

* The civil lawsuit brought by the National Abortion Federation and the "gag order" injunction that still prohibits David from releasing any more of his video evidence exposing Planned Parenthood's illegal fetal tissue business. And now, in light of the Planned Parenthood civil lawsuit, NAF has moved for summary judgment - they want a ruling against David without a trial at all!

* And finally, the civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood personnel in federal court in Seattle, where we just achieved a victory for a second time on appeal, but it appears we may need at least a third victory on appeal before this case ends.

That's why David needs your financial support today. **[And that's why I'm praying you will donate $35 or more to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66220%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=voSh%2fllAAArt1zJBp65VEw&sysid=1)** I won't guess how much you're able to send today. Whether it's $35, $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more... ... I will only say that time is of the essence. So I do ask that you make your donation as soon as you can. **This truly is a "David versus Goliath" type of battle --- with Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the radical left arrayed against our "David."** It's a grave injustice that David is the one being hit with felony charges and massive civil penalties while Planned Parenthood (so far, at least) has gone unpunished. By clearing David of these charges... you and I can allow him to continue with his incredibly important lifesaving work. Remember, over 12 million people on YouTube alone watched the shocking footage he captured. Since that time, 26 states --- over half the country -- have moved to strip Planned Parenthood of taxpayer funding. It's no wonder Planned Parenthood and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal and inhumane activities. You and I cannot let that happen. **[So please don't delay. Donate $35, $50, $100, or more to stand with David Daleiden today.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66221%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ERdSh3EVFJMNXdnocpp13A&sysid=1)** I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get it so I can let David know that you're standing with him. I know he'll be deeply touched by your generous support. May God Bless You, Tom Brejcha
President & Chief Counsel P.S. Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal, ghoulish activities. You and I cannot let that happen. Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense of David Daleiden? **[David is a pro-life hero. clean_body: I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot. Dear Friend, I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot. You may remember David as the undercover journalist who spent 30 months investigating and capturing video evidence of Planned Parenthood 's top leadership --- medical directors, national program directors, even its Senior Director of Medical Services -- callously negotiating the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts. And now, he’s been charged with nine bogus felonies. You see, after David released the shocking videos of the illegal and disgusting actions of abortion executives, Kamala Harris, then California's Attorney General, colluded with Planned Parenthood to file felony charges against David... ... Kamala Harris even ordered the California Department of Justice to raid David's home and confiscate his unpublished videos. I won't sugarcoat it. If not cleared of these charges, David faces steep fines and years in state penitentiary and the consequences of being a convicted felon. While Kamala Harris --- a bought-and-paid-for ally of the abortion industry --- is sitting one heartbeat away from the presidency. That's the bad news. But here's the good news... David is fighting back. In fact, he's taking another opportunity to drag more of Planned Parenthood's dark criminality into the spotlight with two new federal lawsuits. That's right. The Thomas More Society has filed a federal civil rights lawsuit in California on behalf of David against former California Attorney General and now VicePresident Kamala Harris for prosecuting David in bad faith, twisting and perverting California's anti-eavesdropping law to persecute a citizen journalist because of his political views. Then the Thomas More Society filed a defamation (libel) lawsuit in federal court in New York against Planned Parenthood, which said David created a "fake" and "false" "smear campaign" against Planned Parenthood. In other words, the best defense is a good offense. The truth is we could no longer let David suffer such a trampling of his free speech and due process rights without a counterattack. The timing couldn't be more important. This is a critical opportunity to put Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the rest of the abortion industry on trial for conspiring to silence David in order to cover-up their illegal activities. The reality is. . . You couldn't be there when David entered the dark underbelly of the abortion industry --- sitting across the table from abortionists haggling over the price of baby body parts with cold-blooded clarity... "I want a Lamborghini." You couldn't be there as David saw with his own eyes the preborn children who had been killed with great precision and delicacy to preserve their organs for maximum profit. You couldn't be there when the videos were released and Kamala Harris and Planned Parenthood conspired to crush David with trumped up legal charges and an armed raid on his home in which they seized laptops, hard-drives, and recording equipment. And you couldn't be there with David (our criminal defense team was there) when he voluntarily appeared in both Texas and California for booking and processing --- fingerprinted and photographed for a mugshot like a common criminal. But, now, this is the reality... there is something you can do. My name is Tom Brejcha. I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society --- a not-for-profit law firm underwriting and helping to spearhead David's criminal defense. The Thomas More Society is proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, former Kansas Attorney General Phill Kline, the March for Life, and many more. Because when dark forces like Planned Parenthood unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- we fight back. I have to tell you, despite all that David is facing, his spirits remain high. Of course, I've never known anyone in this kind of position who didn't feel an empty pit in his stomach. But David's not giving up. His willingness to fight back is a true profile in Pro-Life courage. Now I'll get right down to it... We anticipate David's legal defense will cost us more than $6 million. That's right, SIX MILLION DOLLARS. In addition to the criminal case and the new federal civil rights and defamation lawsuits, we're currently representing David in THREE other cases. The civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood where we are appealing the jury's verdict, along with the judge's order permanently banning David from doing any more undercover journalism against Planned Parenthood. Recently, we posted a $700,000 appeal bond to keep Planned Parenthood’s nasty collection agents from harassing him with collection agents and even seizing his belongings. We’re fighting back, but we’ll need your help. The civil lawsuit brought by the National Abortion Federation and the "gag order" injunction that still prohibits David from releasing any more of his video evidence exposing Planned Parenthood's illegal fetal tissue business. And now, in light of the Planned Parenthood civil lawsuit, NAF has moved for summary judgment - they want a ruling against David without a trial at all! And finally, the civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood personnel in federal court in Seattle, where we just achieved a victory for a second time on appeal, but it appears we may need at least a third victory on appeal before this case ends. That's why David needs your financial support today. I won't guess how much you're able to send today. Whether it's $35, $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more... ... I will only say that time is of the essence. So I do ask that you make your donation as soon as you can. This truly is a "David versus Goliath" type of battle --- with Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the radical left arrayed against our "David." It's a grave injustice that David is the one being hit with felony charges and massive civil penalties while Planned Parenthood (so far, at least) has gone unpunished. By clearing David of these charges... you and I can allow him to continue with his incredibly important lifesaving work. Remember, over 12 million people on YouTube alone watched the shocking footage he captured. Since that time, 26 states --- over half the country -- have moved to strip Planned Parenthood of taxpayer funding. It's no wonder Planned Parenthood and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal and inhumane activities. You and I cannot let that happen. I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get it so I can let David know that you're standing with him. I know he'll be deeply touched by your generous support. May God Bless You, Tom Brejcha President & Chief Counsel P.S. Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal, ghoulish activities. You and I cannot let that happen. Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense of David Daleiden? ** The Thomas More Society is a not-for-profit, national public interest law firm dedicated to restoring respect in law for life, family, and religious liberty. We know the path to electing more Democrats is mobilizing more people to vote — and there’s good news on that front in Virginia: it has never been easier to vote thanks to the incredible progress made by the Democrats in Virginia’s state government. We can protect this progress by electing Terry.
