Right now, the Virginia governor’s race is Trumpism’s best chance to mount a comeback, and I’m asking you to join me in standing with Terry McAuliffe and against Donald Trump. = Thank you for being a champion of voting rights, Stacey Abrams =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Paid for by Terry for Virginia

name: Nicole Neily, Parents Defending Education
subject: DOJ: “Concerned parents = domesticterrorists?”
body:
Maybe you heard the news – recently, the U.S. Department of Justice said they will mobilize the FBI against parents ... for st
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zssu3ifo39p6e2r77la06mcnsl33fphg46ion55g_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c1h62or4chh2bs) Fellow American, Maybe you heard the news – recently, the U.S. Department of Justice said **they will mobilize the FBI against parents ... for standing up for their own children!** On October 4, 2021, the DOJ announced a new initiative to address “harassment, intimidation and threats of violence” against school board members and employees – including but not limited to **the creation of a federal task force as well as dedicated lines of communication for threat reporting, assessment, and response by law enforcement under the auspices of the FBI.** [**Tell the DOJ this is unacceptable**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2ztpsta0bsdlfoacr6oe1o016em66b3d014eojqf8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c1h62or4chh2bs) My name is Nicole Neily, and I’m the President of Parents Defending Education. We’re a national grassroots organization working to reclaim our schools from activists promoting harmful agendas, and fighting against indoctrination in the classroom -- and _for_ the restoration of a healthy, non-political education for our kids. We are also standing with parents like you who are troubled by what’s happening in our schools today. You might be wondering how something so outrageous -- **the FBI being mobilized against parents for simply speaking up for their own children** \-- could happen in “the land of the free.” It all started recently, when the National School Board Association (NSBA) sent a letter to President Biden asking for help **silencing parents like you** who are demanding change at school board meetings. In their letter, NSBA cites a tiny number of minor incidents to insinuate that** parents who are criticizing and protesting the decisions of school boards are or may be engaging in “domestic terrorism and hate crimes."** While PDE naturally does not support _anyone_ who uses violence or threats against school board members, officials, or teachers, the NSBA choosing to invoke the PATRIOT Act (which was passed after 9/11 to uncover potential terrorist plots) takes it WAY too far. The association of legitimate protest with terrorism and violence reveals both NSBA’s contempt for parents and their unwillingness to understand and hear the sincere cries of parents on behalf of their children. In short, **_NSBA’s letter to President Biden was a thinly veiled threat_** , intended to intimidate into silence and submission the very constituents -- parents and taxpayers like you, -- that its members ostensibly represent. And the Department of Justice is wholly complicit in this charade. [**Tell the DOJ you OPPOSE FBI persecution of parents**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zsi5f606sbgs8ktkjq4r587q1bdn80161g1kc1io_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c1h62or4chh2bs) I’m in awe that NSBA would choose to threaten parents for having the courage to hold them accountable -- as I’m sure you are. And it’s unthinkable that concerned parents should be equated with domestic terrorists. **We will not be bullied.** We refuse to have our free speech chilled by threats. America’s parents have a constitutional right to petition our elected officials -- and Parents Defending Education will continue to do so, with the support of parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens like you! The good news is that this proves the NSBA, the teachers’ unions, and radical school boards around the country are running scared. They’ve been bullying us for decades -- and now that parents are standing up to them, they’re terrified. **The mere fact that they’ve summoned the Biden administration to back up their crazy power trip clearly shows they feel the power slipping from their hands.** In cities and towns across America, we’re seeing a backlash against the school administrators and bureaucrats who disdain the parents whose children they are entrusted with educating. This behavior is arrogant and out of touch and these fiefdoms must be exposed and held accountable. And that’s exactly what Parents Defending Education is doing -- keeping the pressure on the NSBA, teachers’ unions, and school boards. But we need the support of parents, teachers, and concerned Americans like you to effectively fight back against these bullies and defend the rights of American parents and school children. [**Tell the DOJ you won’t be bullied**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zto0gghal113fmi3gu26b0ialgpv4vmca9cad110_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c1h62or4chh2bs) So thank you for standing with us -- and standing _up_ for America’s parents! Nicole Neily President Parents Defending Education 4532 Lee Hwy #119
Arlington VA 22207
---

name: Congresswoman Miller-Meeks
subject: What's your concern?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miller-Meeks for Congress
body:
Checking in

| [](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=13f0ee22b6c742ea8a89a1910d7666d7&_e=WGaWtc71Fj0Bz0VLxd2lQopda_b0Ow3wdjUYS4cqUNU4cSJe265ymMVa5pjOhDxfAHEr7pp-jhx_Ez6ck6pa1ZHU_7y1EbGukSH1njWR8UIFrZNIcncExngO2MvkCd8vpY8cNEYttEbrVp0DguugwAK7keCp6iU7P0qSiMR7M49X3I8J_7GZPbw9d3fIDW_WEBY8qtS7VySROHFBjGgGaWd6KJ7Z4l3CeKjdS3IspSTbUDtlFiK2SNVE7ww0RCbElspvE2P4yN9BNDkOzfB-qVZMYDnCitulD64KlSA_nVFfKqbJsqH2b0dlZ_lIWpfO5sAKmkRndGRoA4CwEXo878iE8gR-o0W63JLLXJvOBN0V4YFPq-dMjkHR6EPVLw4CFY3BbxUXkgunp206Y44p5EUkRPnd3o0NXz45stU8Kw6YPGx3fb1nSlRFMqNooKtwbVmhIDQ2xOL5ulJ2BJm3UkrDjrL3zG0FKE9kB5pxSCMC4jMHOsEqSGgri4bQ_90zdG61c0Ri5BHxGlLueYoO-rf-zOB6Rhxpay0uNGQT9SrLNVJkzZT8i5-kuRiMnn-b)
---
Friend,

I don’t want to be long-winded, but I wanted to reach out to check-in and see what you thought the biggest issue our country is currently facing is right now?

## **We cannot solve problems with the same mentality that created them. The elitists measure success by growth. Growth in budgets,_growth in the size of government_. That growth is paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us.**

It’s time for a fresh perspective to the problems facing Idaho. I believe there are timeless principles that produce natural consequences. It’s time to put principles above politics. I will have one standard to measure success; promises kept. name: Bella
subject: Hi it’s Bella
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1239%2E3611125%2E4GZqZi ][IMG]

Hi everyone,

It’s Bella and I’m Tim’s step-daughter.

I normally wouldn’t do something like this -- email all of you -- but I
want to do my part to make sure Tim is Ohio’s next Senator!

First, I want to tell you some things about him that you might not know.

He’s always available when I need help with my homework. When I have a big
presentation or speech coming up, he will patiently work with me at our
kitchen table until I get it right. Even after a long day on the campaign
trail he’ll text me on the way home asking if we have stuff to work on.

I’m in the process of applying to colleges (which is VERY stressful), but
he’s been so supportive throughout the whole thing. And I’ve even talked
him into doing a few TikTok dances with me every now and again.

Tim is also my biggest cheerleader. Even though I’m the one on the
cheerleading squad, I can always count on him to be cheering me on during
a game or with school or anything else I’m doing. When I was younger and
doing cheer and dance he even took me to a weekend competition all by
himself. Yes, Tim is a cheer dad!

Tim told me his campaign has a big fundraising deadline at the end of this
month, and since he always helps me, I thought it was my turn to help him
out a bit.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5404?t=1007&akid=1239%2E3611125%2E4GZqZi ]Can you help Tim reach his campaign’s goal by chipping in right now?
Tim said if I can raise $5,000 from this email, he’ll make any TikTok I
want.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5404?t=1008&akid=1239%2E3611125%2E4GZqZi ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5438?t=1009&akid=1239%2E3611125%2E4GZqZi ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5439?t=1010&akid=1239%2E3611125%2E4GZqZi ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5440?t=1011&akid=1239%2E3611125%2E4GZqZi ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5441?t=1012&akid=1239%2E3611125%2E4GZqZi ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5404?t=1013&akid=1239%2E3611125%2E4GZqZi ]Other Amount

I know Tim will be a great Senator, but like he always says, if you want
to go fast, go alone -- if you want to go far, go together.

We’ve got to send him to the Senate, together!

Thank you!!

Bella

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5404?t=1014&akid=1239%2E3611125%2E4GZqZi ]Bella

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=1239%2E3611125%2E4GZqZi ][IMG]

touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,

name: Cynthia Cano, Powered By People
subject: I want to tell you why I'm a part of Powered by People
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Today, I want to tell you a little about why I am so proud to be a part of
Powered by People.

As a Texan, a mother, and a voter, I've been angry and sick watching the
GOP harm our democracy over the past years. In just this year alone, the
far-right state legislature – under the direction of Governor Greg Abbott
– passed an extreme voter suppression bill, a restrictive abortion ban,
and is currently in the process of gerrymandering our state to tighten
their power.

It's easy to lose motivation in these moments. But the incredible Powered
by People volunteers always renew my faith. With every door knock, phone
call, and new voter registered, Powered by People is doing the work now to
make the changes we want to see in Texas.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/47725?refcode=ema20211023-159475&t=1001&akid=159475%2E444211%2Ed5-obM ]If
you're in this movement, will you please make a
$5
donation to Powered by People today? Together, we can fight back against
the GOP's abuse of our democracy by connecting with and turning out as
many voters as possible.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/47725?refcode=ema20211023-159475&amount=5&t=1020&akid=159475%2E444211%2Ed5-obM ]Contribute $5

Since 2019, Powered by People volunteers have organized over 20,000
volunteers, made over 76 million voter contact attempts, and registered
over 250,000 likely Democratic voters. And right now, our volunteers are
on the ground registering new voters wherever they are – college campuses,
community events, even their own doorsteps.

I'm proud to be a part of Powered by People because of the work we're
doing, and every incredible person who is willing to get involved with us
and stand up for what they truly believe in.

With your support, we can continue this work and expand our efforts to
reach even more Texans. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/47725?refcode=ema20211023-159475&t=1021&akid=159475%2E444211%2Ed5-obM ]Please, donate what you can today to help fund
our organizing work.

Thank you for being a part of this,

Cynthia Cano
Powered by People

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/47725?refcode=ema20211023-159475&t=1022&akid=159475%2E444211%2Ed5-obM ]Donate »

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=159475%2E444211%2Ed5-obM

subject: NYT: 3 top Democrats retire, House Majority in crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Our fragile House Majority is in full-fledged crisis as Representatives John Yarmuth, David Price, and Mike Doyle just announced they will retire next year rather than face uphill elections against Donald Trump's hand-picked candidates. “The GOP sees the recent retirement announcements of prominent and long-serving Democrats as an acknowledgment of defeat,” according to _The New York Times_. And these are just the latest in a hugely distressing wave of disappointing House Democrat exits that _NYT_ reports are influenced by hyper-partisanship, “Donald J. Trump's continued power over Republicans,” and “redistricting ahead of the 2022 elections.” Focus, Peter: Vulnerable Democrats are retiring because House GOP boss Kevin McCarthy is throwing the establishment machine's weight behind no-name Trump sycophants all across the country in a naked attempt to steal back control of the chamber. There's no time to change the Democrat retirees' minds, Peter, so we've got to fight. When Democrats Turn Out has launched an aggressive digital and ground campaign to protect and strengthen our razor-thin House Majority. But there are exactly ZERO seats we can afford to lose, and we're still $3,407 short of our mission-critical fundraising goal. With more disillusioned Democrats retiring every day and the GOP's “army of energized small-dollar donors” outraising us at every turn, we need absolutely everybody to stand with us right now. We're reaching out directly because you stepped up to protect our fragile House Majority from the GOP electioneering machine in 2020. subject: I’m a black pastor exposing the truth about BLM
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hawkins for Congress
body:
Democrats know they can no longer use physical force to enslave black Americans as they once did. Now, they use the media and culture to oppress us an Democrats know they can no longer use physical force to enslave black Americans as they once did. Now, they use the media and culture to oppress us and convince us that we are still victims. The truth is politicians are making millions off this scheme and that is their only motive. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=03db751af17447a79e605a2914365822&_e=MNfQ1UbWMfYzqv_gDUkq7uIFWDYZZoOZX2mX_cI7hVZ39tNt-QLAtWtfPpp9TRcgokDL4yTN7AXj49KKA251yVOO18t50LHVAz6d_KH5r2j1lU612KV0juMKj5ZryjQYFH9rutBEirnzoLAeQBtsX5Mpa4sCOLLvIBAIIiCjPATHHUq_po1cCiqXWsFNW9Q1gdX075GCUuwdOYeUEDJ6Lu5KvoTZ499bpvA2akWUMeQm0yb2VvTZ1krFhxckmAetqVCDSyl3_DEageqfw1ugcmXwdGUxcQxcgFUm4nXvfN9GLHJgGazBX146HhLvb_-dT1VG1ywELU2S8D-q0ZXny8UbuGu7tG4uleECYtt1wnfgdDmL5PZ9397EurUZ4lNtDLcBXb81b7itAvNxV89nbGEfrhcHMri_AsC3oBt-48vEuNbL5-4W1xNZT2lz2dlzMAxwk7ZVsf3ToDz7OyET_g%3D%3D)
---
Fellow Conservative,

My name is Brian Hawkins. I am a black, conservative pastor running for Congress. Although I am African American, as you can see from my photo above, I do NOT support the Black Lives Matter organization, _let me tell you why._

But first, let me warn you: What I am about to say will get me labeled as an “Uncle Tom” by the radical-Left. They will target my campaign and try to defeat me because I am promoting freedom of thought to the black community. [**I will need your support after I expose the truth about BLM, so please consider pitching in just $5 or $10 after you read my message.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=03db751af17447a79e605a2914365822&_e=MNfQ1UbWMfYzqv_gDUkq7uIFWDYZZoOZX2mX_cI7hVZ39tNt-QLAtWtfPpp9TRcgokDL4yTN7AXj49KKA251yVOO18t50LHVAz6d_KH5r2j1lU612KV0juMKj5ZryjQYFH9rutBEirnzoLAeQBtsX5Mpa4sCOLLvIBAIIiCjPATHHUq_po1cCiqXWsFNW9Q1gdX075GCUuwdOYeUEDJ6Lu5KvoTZ499bpvA2akWUMeQm0yb2VvTZ1krFhxckmAethMzKr98TKVBw1xREAOCvaoiv5A-LJm0690SgSsNBaAPW5T7cnS1SBtrflByy8PhiAzIY-PWs11ENc83eLelsKVOFGfyrZdBxDNikItq5Ft6lS8qxV0Bc2aWZpBMmqde-RUtcbAeqPT4F1JE6CzmLlkqxDCreder27yVjMSGnbPZQQQ6tx90yM6KwTm1NdubhOcrErXDURN35TQqXhhsXrA%3D%3D)

[**STAND UP TO BLM
ELECT A BLACK PATRIOT -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=03db751af17447a79e605a2914365822&_e=MNfQ1UbWMfYzqv_gDUkq7uIFWDYZZoOZX2mX_cI7hVZ39tNt-QLAtWtfPpp9TRcgokDL4yTN7AXj49KKA251yVOO18t50LHVAz6d_KH5r2j1lU612KV0juMKj5ZryjQYFH9rutBEirnzoLAeQBtsX5Mpa4sCOLLvIBAIIiCjPATHHUq_po1cCiqXWsFNW9Q1gdX075GCUuwdOYeUEDJ6Lu5KvoTZ499bpvA2akWUMeQm0yb2VvTZ1krFhxckmAetSDcyDVKl6-F_96P9PSPlaeTsezpMEPwU6NsSjwX5xwnWVnHke-YcFnMT25sRv60x-nB5n7XzzvZSW9ovakAO3CJ8g8l-ZzdJgyGekjczMpzZxS0NzXIK9BHkXvmb34rUA48JvTdLj_6eqltaL0QDcb2xnm3gYHSkWS002dmeOybEVnFpUWJGK7tcDyp-9Z6stQ_B78dXnZ0i2DF6xF0QHQ%3D%3D)
BLM is a racist organization that uses the death of black people to fund and empower Democrats – most of which, are white.

You see, Democrats know they can no longer use physical force to enslave black Americans as they once did. Now, they use the media and culture to oppress us and convince us that we are still victims. The truth is politicians are making millions off this scheme and that is their only motive.

Over this past Independence Day weekend, the BLM Utah chapter called the American flag a _‘symbol of hatred’_ in a Facebook post. They went on to say, _“When we see this flag, we know the person flying it is a racist.”_

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=03db751af17447a79e605a2914365822&_e=MNfQ1UbWMfYzqv_gDUkq7uIFWDYZZoOZX2mX_cI7hVZ39tNt-QLAtWtfPpp9TRcgokDL4yTN7AXj49KKA251yVOO18t50LHVAz6d_KH5r2j1lU612KV0juMKj5ZryjQYFH9rutBEirnzoLAeQBtsX5Mpa4sCOLLvIBAIIiCjPATHHUq_po1cCiqXWsFNW9Q1gdX075GCUuwdOYeUEDJ6Lu5KvoTZ499bpvA2akWUMeQm0yb2VvTZ1krFhxckmAetrng6IMOzoYOpPyUQOZTJNjGC0Vx-I5Y-b9fdS54GxKhzXgv6eaCI6ouuxQGMK-4svQnlg6NraldGl_jUBhQoU9vPToZzHr9205a86SpLbMl82cM_CoLD_Y0m_xkA0WotJigKHf6gp3Lxh0Jy8ZNRSqc84rKAWk0l5NoAA_wYCSCaBs-Bz7UrVsVVV4kxumO2vY8whNcG8JE_6oplR9e1MQ%3D%3D)
I am proud to have the American flag flying outside my home. I am proud to be a black American in 2021 – where I have equal opportunities as white men and women.

But the BLM organization uses _anything_ to divide us – to guilt and fool Americans into funding the lives of corrupt Democrats under the guise of social justice.

[**We cannot allow them to take a symbol of freedom, the American flag, and turn it into a weapon for their agenda. We must stand up right now and fight back against their rhetoric.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=03db751af17447a79e605a2914365822&_e=MNfQ1UbWMfYzqv_gDUkq7uIFWDYZZoOZX2mX_cI7hVZ39tNt-QLAtWtfPpp9TRcgokDL4yTN7AXj49KKA251yVOO18t50LHVAz6d_KH5r2j1lU612KV0juMKj5ZryjQYFH9rutBEirnzoLAeQBtsX5Mpa4sCOLLvIBAIIiCjPATHHUq_po1cCiqXWsFNW9Q1gdX075GCUuwdOYeUEDJ6Lu5KvoTZ499bpvA2akWUMeQm0yb2VvTZ1krFhxckmAetNZxQXUhLU6d-VtWBkpmK0OCwjF7REaj3zjqra5XRP0Kx1VaUVQ2esbj5c02zGlaM3pbw4YRcIXRBuBWnObTchn8y8ZIJxYtLiGP7E5BVl9d9HdL2xuOKl-htnqk3GgKgDtV1jKKExW6_2QspaILxSZyqwfqvrZ6dpMGiJjB4aD4Bod43zefZbnk3o5pT5V6H3sl20sVGFPGMu5vxhNA1YQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: Democrats know they can no longer use physical force to enslave black Americans as they once did. Now, they use the media and culture to oppress us an Democrats know they can no longer use physical force to enslave black Americans as they once did. Now, they use the media and culture to oppress us and convince us that we are still victims. The truth is politicians are making millions off this scheme and that is their only motive. | Fellow Conservative, My name is Brian Hawkins. I am a black, conservative pastor running for Congress. Although I am African American, as you can see from my photo above, I do NOT support the Black Lives Matter organization, let me tell you why. But first, let me warn you: What I am about to say will get me labeled as an “Uncle Tom” by the radical-Left. They will target my campaign and try to defeat me because I am promoting freedom of thought to the black community. BLM is a racist organization that uses the death of black people to fund and empower Democrats – most of which, are white. You see, Democrats know they can no longer use physical force to enslave black Americans as they once did. Now, they use the media and culture to oppress us and convince us that we are still victims. The truth is politicians are making millions off this scheme and that is their only motive. Over this past Independence Day weekend, the BLM Utah chapter called the American flag a ‘symbol of hatred’ in a Facebook post. They went on to say, “When we see this flag, we know the person flying it is a racist.” I am proud to have the American flag flying outside my home. I am proud to be a black American in 2021 – where I have equal opportunities as white men and women. But the BLM organization uses anything to divide us – to guilt and fool Americans into funding the lives of corrupt Democrats under the guise of social justice. Which is why I am running for Congress, to show Americans everywhere that there ARE black conservatives who are fighting to break the chains Democrats use to restrict and control minority communities. Thank you, Pastor Brian Hawkins Republican for Congress FOLLOW ME ON SOCIAL MEDIA @REALPASTORBRIAN | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Don't want to receive any more of our emails? | Paid for by Hawkins for Congress

name: Charles Booker
subject: Even in our darkest crises he finds a way to exploit us.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
He’s rejected health care funds for 9/11 first responders. He was one of just 30 members of the U.S. Senate to vote against an infrastructure bill that was vital to our Commonwealth. And time and again, he spreads misinformation about COVID-19 in an attempt to benefit his stock portfolio.
#
We have to get this guy out of office, Peter.
[](https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11786?refcode=em20211023-1095&%3Bamp%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=1095%2E346206%2EtyR46n)
He’s rejected health care funds for 9/11 first responders. He was one of just 30 members of the U.S. Senate to vote against an infrastructure bill that was vital to the security of our Commonwealth. And currently, he’s doubled down on spreading misinformation about COVID-19 in an attempt to benefit his stock portfolio.
Rand Paul has been putting our lives at risk from the moment he took office. Even during our darkest crises, Rand still finds a way to exploit the moment.
**Enough is enough.** I’m running to replace Rand Paul because the cost of inaction is too high.
**But I can’t do this work alone, Peter.[Will you chip in $5 or anything you can to help power our campaign? It’s critical we secure the funds we need for the rest of this month to build our organizing programs and travel across Kentucky to meet with voters.](https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11786?refcode=em20211023-1095&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=1095%2E346206%2EtyR46n)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11786?refcode=em20211023-1095&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=1095%2E346206%2EtyR46n)**
I know that this movement is on the verge of making history.
**_I know that Kentucky is hungry for bold change and we’re ready for progressive leadership:_**
Two years ago, I witnessed Kentuckians work together to elect a Democratic governor, even though the naysayers said we couldn’t do it in a state with two Republican Senators. I witnessed folks from all walks of life organize to demand justice after Breonna Taylor was killed at the hands of law enforcement. And ever since we announced our campaign, our grassroots movement has only grown stronger.
The excitement is there. **But the biggest challenge we face now is reversing decades of voter suppression and disenfranchisement in Kentucky.** For too long, massive groups of people, especially Black and brown communities, have been excluded and discouraged from participating in our democracy.
We’re working to change that and build a campaign that represents ALL of us. But doing this kind of in-depth voter outreach takes a lot of resources and funding.
**[That’s why it’s important we keep our grassroots fundraising strong and make sure we’re on track for all of our organizing expenses this month. Will you chip in $5 or anything you can to help out?](https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11786?refcode=em20211023-1095&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=1095%2E346206%2EtyR46n)**
Let’s win this,
Charles

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211023-1095-footer&t=24&refcode2=1095_346206_tyR46n&akid=1095%2E346206%2EtyR46n)**
---
Email us: [info@charlesbooker.org](mailto: info@charlesbooker.org)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. To contribute via check, please address to PO Box 4369, Louisville, KY 40204.

And time and again, he spreads misinformation about COVID-19 in an attempt to benefit his stock portfolio. We have to get this guy out of office, Peter. He’s rejected health care funds for 9/11 first responders. He was one of just 30 members of the U.S. Senate to vote against an infrastructure bill that was vital to the security of our Commonwealth. And currently, he’s doubled down on spreading misinformation about COVID-19 in an attempt to benefit his stock portfolio. Rand Paul has been putting our lives at risk from the moment he took office. Even during our darkest crises, Rand still finds a way to exploit the moment. Enough is enough. I’m running to replace Rand Paul because the cost of inaction is too high. But I can’t do this work alone, Peter. I know that this movement is on the verge of making history. clean_body: | | | | | Team -- Steve Sisolak now has SIX Republican opponents looking to unseat him in 2022. All 6 of these MAGA followers will do anything to flip Nevada red \-- and we’re preparing for the GOP war chest to spend millions of dollars attacking Governor Sisolak. Here’s what we need from you to help Steve beat them: | | | | | | | | | | | | | Since Steve has 6 opponents, we thought we’d share 6 accomplishments Steve has made in Nevada: 1\. Led with science-based solutions and ensure that the vaccine is widely available 2\. Raised the minimum wage to support hardworking Nevada families 3\. Passed a public health insurance option to ensure every person has access to health care 4\. Made clean energy investments to combat climate change and boost our economy 5\. Increased funding for public schools so that every child receives a quality education 6\. Expanded access to the ballot box by guaranteeing every active registered voter receives a mail ballot and making vote by mail permanent We know this team won’t allow these Trump cronies to roll back the progress Steve has made for Nevadans. **"Undecided Sen. Ron Johnson outpaces Democrats in fundraising"**
— _Associated Press_ | [Rush a donation →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37863171/312966089/-1230885654?refcode=em21_211023_EOM2_fndd_gq_act___RJA_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211023_EOM2_fndd_gq_act___RJA_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTVkMzcyMC02MzM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tf3IWM-ShMyEy3muxEedJ29wrXGkkdxikTc0EU2DKig=)
---

Well, that’s a headline you don’t want to see. Even as Ron Johnson is covering up for January 6th insurrectionists, spreading anti-vaccine conspiracies, and calling the climate crisis “bullsh*t” behind closed doors -- a truckload of cash from his far-right and corporate backers just keeps pouring in. It’s unbelievable.

But the bad news doesn't end there: Ron Johnson isn’t the only one building up a campaign war chest... _the National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC) has already raised more than $76 million this year._ There is no doubt the GOP will spend a massive sum of money to keep Wisconsin’s U.S. Senate seat red. Here’s why:

**If Ron Johnson loses, Mitch McConnell’s path back to Senate Majority Leader becomes that much more difficult.**

Taking on their kind of money will be challenging, but going dollar-for-dollar against Ron Johnson and national Republicans is not how we'll flip this seat. We can only win this race with a strong grassroots team full of people in all 72 Wisconsin counties who are not afraid of taking on a fight -- not even a tough one. That’s exactly what Sarah Godlewski is building in this campaign, but she cannot do it alone.

**[We’re collecting as many online donations as possible before the end-of-month deadline. Can we count on you to chip in today? Any amount you can give will go a long way in our fight for Wisconsin workers and families.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37863172/312966090/-1230885654?refcode=em21_211023_EOM2_fndd_gq_act___RJA_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211023_EOM2_fndd_gq_act___RJA_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTVkMzcyMC02MzM0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tf3IWM-ShMyEy3muxEedJ29wrXGkkdxikTc0EU2DKig=)**

clean_body: "Undecided Sen. Ron Johnson outpaces Democrats in fundraising" — Associated Press | = Well, that’s a headline you don’t want to see. Even as Ron Johnson is covering up for January 6th insurrectionists, spreading anti-vaccine conspiracies, and calling the climate crisis “bullsht” behind closed doors -- a truckload of cash from his far-right and corporate backers just keeps pouring in. It’s unbelievable. But the bad news doesn't end there: Ron Johnson isn’t the only one building up a campaign war chest... the National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC) has already raised more than $76 million this year. There is no doubt the GOP will spend a massive sum of money to keep Wisconsin’s U.S. Senate seat red. Here’s why: If Ron Johnson loses, Mitch McConnell’s path back to Senate Majority Leader becomes that much more difficult. Taking on their kind of money will be challenging, but going dollar-for-dollar against Ron Johnson and national Republicans is not how we'll flip this seat. We can only win this race with a strong grassroots team full of people in all 72 Wisconsin counties who are not afraid of taking on a fight -- not even a tough one. That’s exactly what Sarah Godlewski is building in this campaign, but she cannot do it alone. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks so much for stepping up! — Team Sarah Sarah Godlewski is running for U.S. Senate to put hard-working Wisconsin families first. She's the only Democrat in this race who has won statewide twice. With your help, she can defeat Ron Johnson, too. Chip in to join our grassroots campaign: | = Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin Sarah for Wisconsin PO Box 166 Madison, WI 53701 United States

clean_body: | | | = | | Derek, Terry’s in trouble, and Trumpism is on the rise in Virginia. Don’t believe me? Just look at the polls! Almost every poll out of the Virginia Governor’s race has the election a statistical tie — the latest Monmouth poll has Terry and Glenn Youngkin tied at 46–46! I’ve looked at my fair share of polls before, Derek, and let me tell you — a poll showing a beloved governor like Terry tied with an extremist Republican like Glenn Youngkin would have me sounding alarm bells. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = I thought we were done with extremists like Glenn Youngkin in Virginia. Just last year we sent Donald Trump packing, but now his hand-picked candidate is on the rise. = – James Carville =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Paid for by Terry for Virginia

body:
Are Democrats? | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miV04tp4Fy6FnycaH8AsjDGHsAs2bfVePLXHBLcIXKEniCSPNmYcNCaifVTtEwp6yOsvTnmc4_Eg4tg4ocmCy297ysvYHP_Gj1uJqne6VPSA6A78ki2GKE_M4ZD1zFTo9D2juwivdaI-GAHLTewvx2iCDj-nuh_SiiiHbZKhi2SwsA8BTqUGL5eTs5AsJQ5Asg0PqujPdNuVh63O7u3NwsXsb-nwHFUo9iItHG5Z1NTgimp38a6vgPWQHNjesealiPNkSCGhYhRNhmpR2rKlQGLGt_O89Qj2GqCAESFRHRAu3P7qYb1fTqLZq4qL6rw9OZgwQxfiLWZG-9woW0_rDPWw/3ge/hkvSa0_cTDOPVOx9aoB0yg/h0/1CLt2sF5-iptREOc1oTw1EWo_CfRXmmsfrsbVKQ7Xzg)
Republicans are taking the Virginia governor’s race seriously.

**They’re spending millions** on one of the largest field programs the Commonwealth has ever seen. **They’re fired up** to try to flip the state red for the first time in nearly a decade. **They have history and Donald Trump on their side, and polls are starting to give them the advantage.**

Meanwhile, Democrats are asleep at the wheel.

Enthusiasm is at an all time low, people are pretending that Virginia is just a blue state, and we aren’t seeing people pitch in toward our final filing deadline.

Let’s make one thing clear -- **_Virginia isn’t a blue state._**

**[If we’re going to wake up Democrats, we’re going to need your help. We only have a week left to turn out the voters we need. Will you donate right now to make sure we have the resources we need to alert Democrats to the danger we’re in?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miV04tp4Fy6FnycaH8AsjDGHsAs2bfVePLXHBLcIXKEnh8PNDYkyXMQmh7Gg0OdSE-LTIFaCBP1dtUVPVrNezM5Uj_9pk4d4lIbC4u_DCHHgRUij1ZBWfmOVB8S07HS1vpoFHnZcTSezC5I-F_trps9OlceaRYx0pGBT7gXA1toNMhdNNxlsoeEDNIPTyOB5qzj34ruGfdw_XOWclHrBgcFIUejvskOdC6voYmWVmsmt9Iy4rPyxpjRoRorDr0ExIJuYFoLmBN5IEWeS2o0qUmd4juyYpBgK2Pn8VfQwvkuQb2yw4y5lZF2eKATSLLioYB2Bf5iy1EPxNvVNRvOBhYbw/3ge/hkvSa0_cTDOPVOx9aoB0yg/h1/_ELXS5-7wR32sS7zBOvoTi5z7N9XLvTMxK7wBVHj8CA)** **[ Donate $25 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miV04tp4Fy6FnycaH8AsjDGHsAs2bfVePLXHBLcIXKEnjsQPB3lDudY-vZ35LSHUAwFX6IM4ZIPbrp6rUtKtxlNo-fIOJ5hQHxUutr1FMx4NR_g5gJ5XH4I9jQFhJCh-IXN2G0F1qM8ZZIsIWt5Gqj0BYoVLLofQs9rJ6ptrYkA_PQ0VgaHUQh8JQ0JlTVMFlswf90V8oJl4lEmRo6G3tNsEUaTB2i146Ic24exgefke4GV5bBJjYt3egdgNnMWK3CvMjAgApG0oNMjN8fkRLN1k9WbqKeIttwcCwbHNfbnOy_SQOvw666sBxTwxSE-qd7O3fRe3esH1mjtK-w_61sB4HOhGINhlAnFQitXmwRWkk/3ge/hkvSa0_cTDOPVOx9aoB0yg/h2/xIj97FkHWQHdZ64s9mEpyqovCs_LvpF_dgFXTaRs-ns)

Enthusiasm is at an all time low, people are pretending that Virginia is just a blue state, and we aren’t seeing people pitch in toward our final filing deadline. Let’s make one thing clear -- Virginia isn’t a blue state. If we aren’t careful, Republicans could flip Virginia and turn it PERMANENTLY RED. We can’t let that happen. \-- Common Good VA | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via .
